33203.title: Gender-Based Violence in Schools and Girls’ Education: Experimental Evidence from Mozambique
33203.zh_title: 校园性别暴力与女童教育：来自莫桑比克的实验证据
33203.authors: Sofia Amaral, Aixa Garcia-Ramos, Selim Gulesci, Alejandra Ramos, Sarita P. Ore-Quispe, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
33203.abstract: Gender-based violence (GBV) at schools is a pervasive problem that affects millions of adolescent girls worldwide. In partnership with the Ministry of Education in Mozambique, we developed an intervention to increase the capacity of key school personnel to address GBV and to improve students’ awareness as well as proactive behaviors. To understand the role of GBV on girls’ education, we randomized not only exposure to the intervention but also whether the student component was targeted to girls only, boys only, or both. Our findings indicate a reduction in sexual violence by teachers and school staff against girls, regardless of the targeted gender group, providing evidence of the role of improving the capacity of key school personnel to deter perpetrators. Using administrative records, we also find that in schools where the intervention encouraged proactive behavior by girls, there was an increase in their school enrollment, largely due to an increased propensity for GBV reporting by victims. Our findings suggest that effectively mitigating violence to improve girls’ schooling requires a dual approach: deterring potential perpetrators and fostering a proactive stance among victims, such as increased reporting.
33203.zh_abstract: 校园性别暴力是一个普遍存在的问题，影响着全球数百万青春期女童。我们与莫桑比克教育部合作，开发了一项干预措施，旨在提高关键学校人员应对性别暴力的能力，并改善学生的认知及主动行为。为了理解性别暴力对女童教育的作用，我们不仅随机分配了是否接受干预，还随机分配了学生部分是否仅针对女童、仅针对男童或两者都针对。我们的研究结果表明，无论针对哪个性别群体，教师和学校工作人员对女童的性暴力都有所减少，这为提升关键学校人员能力以威慑施暴者的作用提供了证据。利用行政记录，我们还发现，在鼓励女童采取主动行为的学校中，女童的入学率有所提高，这主要是由于受害者举报性别暴力的倾向增加。我们的研究结果表明，要有效减轻暴力以改善女童教育，需要双管齐下：威慑潜在的施暴者，并培养受害者（如增加举报）的主动姿态。

33202.title: r-g before and after the Great Wars 1507-2023
33202.abstract: We present new long-run samples of r-g series over centuries for key economies in the international financial system. Across a wide variety of econometric approaches, and including duration-matched constructions, we demonstrate strong evidence of trend stationarity in these series. Although we confirm trend stationarity, we find robust evidence of a major structural break in the first third of the 20th century. A multi-century downward trend in r-g appears to have levelled off in the years around 1930, and since then r-g has shown high volatility coupled with clear upwards pressure: notably, though real interest rates may still appear favorably low, aggregate growth rates are drifting downwards in advanced economies since the interwar period, creating secular pressures on r-g and debt sustainability. Our results stand in contrast to much recent literature and suggest the need for much more caution in assuming benign trends in global public debt sustainability. At the same time, when adding riskier elements of capital returns, the data lend support for structurally increasing "dynamic efficiency". We then associate the key 1930s inflection to the establishment and growth of welfare states in advanced economies, and the surge in non-defense, non-interest expenditures.
33202.zh_abstract: 我们提供了国际金融体系中关键经济体几个世纪以来r-g序列的新长期样本。通过多种计量经济学方法，包括期限匹配的构建，我们证明了这些序列存在趋势平稳性的有力证据。尽管我们确认了趋势平稳性，但我们发现了20世纪前三分之一时期存在一个重大结构性断裂的有力证据。r-g长达数个世纪的下降趋势似乎在1930年左右趋于平稳，此后r-g表现出高波动性并伴有明显的上行压力：值得注意的是，尽管实际利率可能仍然看似有利地偏低，但自两次世界大战期间以来，发达经济体的总体增长率正在向下漂移，这给r-g和债务可持续性带来了长期压力。我们的结果与近期许多文献形成对比，并表明在假设全球公共债务可持续性呈良性趋势时需要更加谨慎。同时，当加入资本回报中风险较高的要素时，数据支持结构性增强的“动态效率”。然后，我们将关键的1930年代拐点与发达经济体福利国家的建立和增长以及非国防、非利息支出的激增联系起来。

33201.title: Market Power and Redeemable Loyalty Token Design
33201.zh_title: 市场势力与可赎回忠诚代币设计
33201.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Zhiheng He, Yang You
33201.abstract: Digitalization has led to a rapid expansion of loyalty tokens typically bundled as part of product price. An open question is whether, as technology evolves, firms will have a strong incentive to make loyalty tokens tradable, thereby raising regulation issues, including for monetary and banking authorities. Our main finding is that, under fairly general assumptions, firms will still have strong incentives to maintain non-tradability. This may seem surprising, given that an individual consumer would be willing to pay a premium for tradable tokens. However, provided the tokens do not offer a convenience yield to non-platform consumers, non-tradability compensates by expanding the outstanding stock of tokens outstanding at any one time, thereby providing a better overall form of financing. We further show that an issuer with stronger market power tends to make its revenue more token-dependent. Empirical results from airline mileage and hotel reward programs align with our theory.
33201.zh_abstract: 数字化导致忠诚代币迅速扩张，这些代币通常作为产品价格的一部分捆绑销售。一个悬而未决的问题是，随着技术发展，企业是否有强烈动机使忠诚代币可交易，从而引发监管问题，包括货币和银行当局的关注。我们的主要发现是，在相当一般的假设下，企业仍然有强烈动机维持代币的不可交易性。这似乎令人惊讶，因为单个消费者愿意为可交易代币支付溢价。然而，只要代币不向非平台消费者提供便利收益，不可交易性通过在任何时点扩大流通中的代币存量来补偿，从而提供一种更好的整体融资形式。我们进一步表明，具有更强市场势力的发行者倾向于使其收入更依赖代币。来自航空里程和酒店奖励计划的实证结果与我们的理论一致。

33200.title: Labor Force Transitions
33200.authors: Rui Castro, Fabian Lange, Markus Poschke
33200.abstract: Labor Force States and flows between are useful tools to model individual dynamics in the labor market. This chapter reviews recent literature uncovering substantial heterogeneity in transitions across Labor Force States. We review methods and results by replicating leading studies using Canadian data and relate our findings to important literatures on recall non-employment, duration dependence, and job ladders.
33200.zh_abstract: 劳动力状态及其之间的流动是模拟劳动力市场中个体动态的有用工具。本章回顾了近期文献，这些文献揭示了劳动力状态转换中存在显著的异质性。我们通过使用加拿大数据复制领先研究来回顾方法和结果，并将我们的发现与关于召回型非就业、持续时间依赖性和工作阶梯的重要文献联系起来。

33217.title: Painful Bargaining: Evidence from Anesthesia Rollups
33217.zh_title: 痛苦的谈判：来自麻醉业务整合的证据
33217.authors: Aslihan Asil, Paulo Ramos, Amanda Starc, Thomas G. Wollmann
33217.abstract: A rollup is a series of acquisitions through which a financial sponsor consolidates ownership. Increasingly, this strategy is shaping economically important markets, but historically, it has escaped antitrust enforcement. We study this phenomenon in the anesthesia industry, site of the first rollup-based antitrust case in US history. First, we identify eighteen other rollups of anesthesia practices that are observationally similar to the three litigated ones. Next, we show that rollups consolidate ownership and prices rise sharply after competing practices are acquired. Last, we estimate a structural bargaining model and simulate counterfactual equilibria under various remedies.
33217.zh_abstract: 业务整合是指财务发起人通过一系列收购来巩固所有权。这种策略正日益塑造着经济上重要的市场，但从历史上看，它一直逃脱了反垄断执法。我们研究了麻醉行业的这一现象，该行业是美国历史上首个基于业务整合的反垄断案件的发生地。首先，我们识别了另外18个麻醉业务的整合案例，它们在观察特征上与那三个被诉讼的案例相似。其次，我们表明，在竞争性业务被收购后，整合会巩固所有权，价格会急剧上涨。最后，我们估计了一个结构性讨价还价模型，并模拟了各种补救措施下的反事实均衡。

33216.title: Predicting College Closures and Financial Distress
33216.zh_title: 预测大学关闭与财务困境
33216.authors: Robert J. Kelchen, Dubravka Ritter, Douglas A. Webber
33216.abstract: In this paper, we assemble the most comprehensive dataset to date on the characteristics of colleges and universities, including dates of operation, institutional setting, student body, staff, and finance data from 2002 to 2023. We provide an extensive description of what is known and unknown about closed colleges compared with institutions that did not close. Using this data, we first develop a series of predictive models of financial distress, utilizing factors like operational revenue/expense patterns, sources of revenue, metrics of liquidity and leverage, enrollment/staff patterns, and prior signs of significant financial strain. We benchmark these models against existing federal government screening mechanisms such as financial responsibility scores and heightened cash monitoring. We document a high degree of missing data among colleges that eventually close and show that this is a key impediment to identifying at risk institutions. We then show that modern machine learning techniques, combined with richer data, are far more effective at predicting college closures than linear probability models, and considerably more effective than existing accountability metrics. Our preferred model, which combines an off-the-shelf machine learning algorithm with the richest set of explanatory variables, can significantly improve predictive accuracy even for institutions with complete data, but is particularly helpful for predicting instances of financial distress for institutions with spotty data. Finally, we conduct simulations using our estimates to contemplate likely increases in future closures, showing that enrollment challenges resulting from an impending demographic cliff are likely to significantly increase annual college closures for reasonable scenarios.
33216.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们汇编了迄今为止最全面的大学特征数据集，包括2002年至2023年的运营日期、机构环境、学生群体、教职员工和财务数据。我们详细描述了已关闭大学与未关闭机构相比已知和未知的信息。利用这些数据，我们首先开发了一系列财务困境预测模型，利用运营收入/支出模式、收入来源、流动性和杠杆指标、招生/员工模式以及重大财务压力的先前迹象等因素。我们将这些模型与现有的联邦政府筛选机制（如财务责任评分和加强现金监控）进行基准比较。我们记录了最终关闭的大学中存在大量缺失数据，并表明这是识别风险机构的关键障碍。然后，我们证明，结合更丰富数据的现代机器学习技术在预测大学关闭方面比线性概率模型有效得多，并且比现有的问责指标有效得多。我们首选的模型将现成的机器学习算法与最丰富的解释变量集相结合，即使对于数据完整的机构也能显著提高预测准确性，但对于预测数据不完整机构的财务困境实例尤其有帮助。最后，我们利用我们的估计进行模拟，以预测未来关闭的可能增加，表明在合理情景下，即将到来的人口悬崖导致的招生挑战可能会显著增加每年的大学关闭数量。

33215.title: Dispersed Information, Nominal Rigidities and Monetary Business Cycles: A Hayekian Perspective
33215.zh_title: 分散信息、名义刚性与货币商业周期：哈耶克视角
33215.abstract: We study the propagation of nominal shocks in a dispersed information economy where firms learn from and respond to information generated by their activities in product and factor markets. We prove the existence of a “Hayekian benchmark”, defined by conditions under which imperfect information has no effect on equilibrium outcomes. This occurs under fairly general conditions when prices are flexible, i.e. without nominal frictions, informational frictions are irrelevant. With sticky prices, however, this irrelevance obtains only if there are no strategic complementarities in pricing and aggregate and idiosyncratic shocks are equally persistent. With complementarities and/or differences in persistence, the interaction of nominal and informational frictions slows down price adjustment, amplifying real effects from nominal shocks (relative to a full information model with only nominal frictions). In a calibrated model, the amplification is most pronounced over the medium to long term. In the short run, market generated information leads to substantial aggregate price adjustment, even though firms may be completely unaware of changes in aggregate conditions.
33215.zh_abstract: 我们研究了名义冲击在分散信息经济中的传导机制，在该经济中，企业从其在产品和要素市场活动中产生的信息中学习并做出反应。我们证明了“哈耶克基准”的存在，该基准由不完全信息对均衡结果没有影响的条件所定义。当价格具有弹性时，即在没有名义摩擦的情况下，信息摩擦是无关紧要的，这在相当一般的条件下成立。然而，在价格粘性的情况下，这种无关性只有在定价中没有战略互补性且总体冲击和特质冲击具有同等持续性时才能实现。当存在互补性和/或持续性差异时，名义摩擦和信息摩擦的相互作用会减缓价格调整，从而放大名义冲击的实际效应（相对于仅存在名义摩擦的完全信息模型）。在校准模型中，这种放大效应在中长期最为显著。在短期内，市场产生的信息会导致总体价格大幅调整，即使企业可能完全不了解总体状况的变化。

33214.title: The Causal Effects of Income on Political Attitudes and Behavior: A Randomized Field Experiment
33214.zh_title: 收入对政治态度和行为的因果效应：一项随机实地实验
33214.authors: David E. Broockman, Elizabeth Rhodes, Alexander W. Bartik, Karina Dotson, Sarah Miller, Patrick K. Krause, Eva Vivalt
33214.abstract: We study the causal effects of income on political attitudes and behavior with a field experiment. In the experiment, a non-profit gifted 1,000 low-income Americans $\$1,000$ per month for three years tax-free, and 2,000 control participants $\$50$ monthly. Contrary to resource models of participation, we find no effects on political participation or engagement, and rule out effects equivalent to the observational association between turnout and income. Political preferences largely do not change, with the estimates again distinguishable from the observational relationship that economic conservatism increases with income. Dispositions such as trust in government, polarization, and support for democracy also do not change. We do find effects consistent with mood misattribution: affect towards one's own racial group, other racial groups, and some politicians slightly improves. There is also some evidence that treated participants saw work as more important for individuals, society, or even as a requirement for accessing government programs; qualitative evidence illuminates potential mechanisms. Our findings contrast with findings from other economic shocks such as government-sponsored or taxable transfers—thereby helping clarify the mechanisms likely responsible for their effects—and underscore the durability of political predispositions.
33214.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项实地实验研究了收入对政治态度和行为的因果效应。在实验中，一个非营利组织向1000名低收入美国人每月免税赠送1000美元，为期三年，并向2000名对照组参与者每月赠送50美元。与参与的资源模型相反，我们发现对政治参与或投入没有影响，并排除了相当于投票率与收入之间观察关联的效应。政治偏好基本没有改变，这些估计再次与经济保守主义随收入增加而增强的观察关系区分开来。诸如对政府的信任、两极分化和对民主的支持等倾向也没有改变。我们确实发现了与情绪错误归因一致的效应：对自己种族群体、其他种族群体以及一些政治人物的情感略有改善。还有一些证据表明，受试者认为工作对个人、社会更重要，甚至是获得政府项目的必要条件；定性证据阐明了潜在的机制。我们的发现与政府资助或应税转移等其他经济冲击的发现形成对比——从而有助于澄清可能造成其影响的机制——并强调了政治倾向的持久性。

33213.title: Subsidizing Medical Spending through the Tax Code: Take-Up, Targeting and the Cost of Claiming
33213.zh_title: 通过税法补贴医疗支出：参与率、目标定位与申报成本
33213.abstract: The U.S. tax code partially subsidizes out-of-pocket medical spending as itemized medical deductions (IMDs). In this paper, using detailed information in the Health and Retirement Study, I find that while a substantial share of medical spending among older Americans is deducted through the tax code, take-up is incomplete: 61.8 (50.5) percent of potential tax savings (deductions) are claimed, resulting in lost tax savings of $\$5.4$ billion annually. Further, frictions in take-up result in diverting tax savings from higher-need populations. I investigate potential mechanisms and estimate a discrete choice model to simulate eligibility, take-up and the implied cost of claiming under different policy counterfactuals. The results indicate that subsidizing medical expenses through the tax code imposes significant economic burdens, reducing the net subsidy available to taxpayers.
33213.zh_abstract: 美国税法通过列举式医疗扣除（IMD）部分补贴自付医疗支出。在本文中，利用健康与退休研究中的详细信息，我发现，虽然美国老年人医疗支出中有相当一部分通过税法进行了扣除，但参与率并不完全：61.8%（50.5%）的潜在税收节省（扣除）被申报，导致每年损失54亿美元的税收节省。此外，参与中的摩擦导致税收节省从需求更高的群体中转移。我研究了潜在机制，并估计了一个离散选择模型，以模拟不同政策反事实下的资格、参与率和隐含的申报成本。结果表明，通过税法补贴医疗支出带来了显著的经济负担，减少了纳税人可获得的净补贴。

33212.title: The Political Economy of School Finance Systems with Endogenous State and Local Tax Policies
33212.zh_title: 具有内生州和地方税收政策的学校财政体系的政治经济学
33212.authors: Stephen Calabrese, Dennis Epple, Richard Romano
33212.abstract: Beginning in the 1970’s, many state courts declared the widespread inequality in education spending across schools to violate their state’s constitution. Funding systems then emerged providing differing approaches to state and local support of education. We develop a theoretical framework and characterize outcomes under alternative systems. Our framework is distinctive in having voting over policies in both state and local elections. We also develop a calibrated computational model to compare equilibrium outcomes under the alternative school finance systems and to examine across state differences in expenditures. The model predicts that voters prefer systems with mixed state and local finance with designs mirroring those observed in practice.
33212.zh_abstract: 从20世纪70年代开始，许多州法院宣布学校间教育支出的普遍不平等违反了州宪法。随后出现的资助体系为州和地方对教育的支持提供了不同的方法。我们开发了一个理论框架，并描述了替代体系下的结果。我们的框架的独特之处在于，在州和地方选举中都有对政策的投票。我们还开发了一个校准的计算模型，以比较替代学校财政体系下的均衡结果，并考察各州之间支出的差异。该模型预测，选民偏好混合州和地方财政的体系，其设计与实践中观察到的模式相似。
33212.meta: Programs：ED, PE, POL；JEL：H10, H19, H72, I24

33211.title: Systemic Risk Measures: From the Panic of 1907 to the Banking Stress of 2023
33211.zh_title: 系统性风险度量：从1907年恐慌到2023年银行业压力
33211.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Markus K. Brunnermeier, Diane Pierret
33211.abstract: We assess the efficacy of market-based systemic risk measures that rely on U.S. financial firms’ stock return co-movements with market- or sector-wide returns under stress from 1895 to 2023. Stress episodes are identified using corporate bond spread widening and narrative dating, spanning from the Panic of 1907 to the Banking Stress of 2023. Measures observed prior to the onset of stress episodes predict market outcomes (realized volatility and returns), balance sheet outcomes (lending, profitability, and run risk), and bank failures. Specifically, the measures are: (i) particularly effective in capturing the cross-sectional ranking of institutions conditional on a stress episode, rather than aggregate outcomes; (ii) more informative when stress episodes are severe; and (iii) relevant for both banks and non-bank financial institutions, although measures incorporating market leverage are especially informative for banks. A comparative analysis shows that market-based indicators offer information that is distinct from, and complementary to, traditional balance sheet metrics used in supervisory and macroprudential risk assessment.
33211.zh_abstract: 我们评估了基于市场的系统性风险度量的有效性，这些度量依赖于1895年至2023年压力时期美国金融公司股票收益与市场或行业范围收益的共同变动。压力事件通过公司债券利差扩大和叙事日期确定，范围从1907年恐慌到2023年银行业压力。在压力事件开始前观察到的度量预测了市场结果（已实现波动率和收益）、资产负债表结果（贷款、盈利能力和挤兑风险）以及银行倒闭。具体来说，这些度量：（i）在捕捉压力事件下机构的横截面排名方面特别有效，而非总体结果；（ii）当压力事件严重时信息量更大；（iii）对银行和非银行金融机构都相关，尽管包含市场杠杆的度量对银行尤其具有信息量。比较分析表明，基于市场的指标提供了与监管和宏观审慎风险评估中使用的传统资产负债表指标不同且互补的信息。
33211.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：G01, G20, G21, G23, G28

33210.title: Unresolved Conflict in Workers' Compensation: The Impact of Legal Representation on Workers' Compensation Benefits
33210.zh_title: 工伤保险中未解决的冲突：法律代理对工伤保险赔偿的影响
33210.abstract: We estimate the causal effect of attorney involvement on the indemnity benefits workers receive after their injuries. To address the fundamental challenge that claims and injuries may differ on unmeasured dimensions that affect both attorney involvement and benefits received, we propose and use two instruments. The first is the baseline local area attorney involvement rate derived from a subset of claims for fractures, lacerations, and contusions without permanent partial disability and/or lump-sum payments. The second instrument is a delay in the first indemnity payment. Our outcome is the total indemnity benefits that workers receive after their injuries, which captures payments to workers for time lost from work and other adverse effects of an injury. Our analysis of more than 950,000 claims with more than seven days of lost time indicates that attorney involvement substantially increases total indemnity benefits paid to workers.
33210.zh_abstract: 我们估计了律师介入对工人受伤后获得的伤残赔偿金的因果效应。为了解决索赔和伤害可能在未测量的维度上存在差异（这些差异同时影响律师介入和获得的赔偿）这一根本性挑战，我们提出并使用两种工具变量。第一个工具变量是基于骨折、撕裂伤和挫伤索赔子集（无永久性部分残疾和/或一次性付款）得出的当地基线律师介入率。第二个工具变量是首次伤残赔偿金的延迟支付。我们的结果是工人受伤后获得的总伤残赔偿金，这涵盖了因工伤导致的工作时间损失和其他不利影响的支付。我们对超过95万起损失时间超过七天的索赔的分析表明，律师介入显著增加了支付给工人的总伤残赔偿金。
33210.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J38, K31

33209.title: Household Responses to Guaranteed Income: Experimental Evidence from Compton, California
33209.zh_title: 家庭对保证收入的反应：来自加利福尼亚州康普顿的实验证据
33209.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Sewin Chan, Sara Constantino, Johannes Haushofer, Jonathan Morduch
33209.abstract: We study the effects of a two-year unconditional cash transfer program for lowincome households in Compton, California between 2021 and 2023. 695 households were randomly assigned to receive transfers averaging about $\$500$ per month over a two year period, with 1,402 households randomly assigned to a control group. To measure the impact of transfer frequency, half of the recipients were paid twice per month and the other half received quarterly transfers. We surveyed 1,074 respondents 18 months after the beginning of transfers. Receiving guaranteed income had no impact on the labor supply of full-time workers, but part-time workers (at baseline) had lower labor market participation by 13 percentage points. Income (excluding the transfer) was reduced by $\$333$ per month on average relative to control households, and expenditures were reduced by $\$302$ per month. At the same time, average non-housing debt balances declined by $\$2,190$ over 18 months relative to the control group, although the drop is not statistically significant. We find a significant improvement in housing security, but no overall effects on indices of psychological and financial well-being. The recipients of twice-monthly transfers were more likely to own a car, had lower credit card debt and greater food security than recipients of quarterly transfers, but otherwise transfer frequency had little impact. Compared to male recipients, female recipients reported a greater increase in financial security, and a smaller reduction in earned income and expenditures.
33209.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2021年至2023年间在加利福尼亚州康普顿针对低收入家庭实施的两年期无条件现金转移计划的效果。695户家庭被随机分配，在两年期间平均每月获得约500美元的转移支付，另有1402户家庭被随机分配到对照组。为衡量转移支付频率的影响，一半受助者每月领取两次，另一半则每季度领取一次。我们在转移支付开始18个月后对1074名受访者进行了调查。获得保证收入对全职工作者的劳动供给没有影响，但兼职工作者（在基线时）的劳动市场参与率降低了13个百分点。与对照组相比，收入（不包括转移支付）平均每月减少333美元，支出每月减少302美元。同时，相对于对照组，平均非住房债务余额在18个月内下降了2190美元，尽管这一下降在统计上并不显著。我们发现住房保障有显著改善，但对心理和财务福祉指数没有整体影响。与每季度领取转移支付的受助者相比，每月领取两次的受助者更可能拥有汽车，信用卡债务更低，粮食保障更高，但除此之外，转移支付频率影响甚微。与男性受助者相比，女性受助者报告财务安全感有更大提升，而劳动收入和支出减少幅度更小。

33208.title: FinTech Lending to Borrowers with No Credit History
33208.zh_title: 金融科技向无信用记录借款人的贷款
33208.authors: Laura Chioda, Paul Gertler, Sean Higgins, Paolina C. Medina
33208.abstract: Despite the promise of FinTech lending to expand credit access to populations without a formal credit history, FinTech lenders primarily lend to applicants with a formal credit history and rely on conventional credit bureau scores as an input to their algorithms. Using data from a large FinTech lender in Mexico, we show that alternative data from digital transactions through a delivery app are effective at predicting creditworthiness for borrowers with no credit history. Using account-by-month level data on revenues and costs, a machine learning model predicting profits generates similar profits as a model predicting default.
33208.zh_abstract: 尽管金融科技贷款有望扩大对无正式信用记录人群的信贷获取，但金融科技贷款机构主要向有正式信用记录的申请人放贷，并依赖传统的信用局评分作为其算法的输入。利用墨西哥一家大型金融科技贷款机构的数据，我们表明，来自配送应用程序数字交易的替代数据能有效预测无信用记录借款人的信用worthiness。使用按月计算的收入和成本账户数据，一个预测利润的机器学习模型产生的利润与预测违约的模型相似。

33207.title: The End of Oil
33207.abstract: It is now plausible to envision scenarios in which global demand for crude oil falls to essentially zero by the end of this century, driven by improvements in clean energy technologies, adoption of stringent climate policies, or both. This paper asks what such a demand decline, when anticipated, might mean for global oil supply. One possibility is the well-known “green paradox”: because oil is an exhaustible resource, producers may accelerate near-term extraction in order to beat the demand decline. This reaction would increase near-term CO2 emissions and could possibly even lead the total present value of climate damages to be greater than if demand had not declined at all. However, because oil extraction requires potentially long-lived investments in wells and other infrastructure, the opposite may occur: an anticipated demand decline reduces producers' investment rates, decreasing near-term oil production and CO2 emissions. To evaluate whether this disinvestment effect outweighs the green paradox, or vice-versa, I develop a tractable model of global oil supply that incorporates both effects, while also capturing industry features such as heterogeneous producers, exercise of market power by low-cost OPEC producers, and marginal drilling costs that increase with the rate of drilling. I find that for model inputs with the strongest empirical support, the disinvestment effect outweighs the traditional green paradox. In order for anticipation effects on net to substantially increase cumulative global oil extraction, I find that industry investments must have short time horizons, and that producers must have discount rates that are comparable to U.S. treasury bill rates.
33207.zh_abstract: 现在可以设想这样的情景：到本世纪末，全球原油需求可能降至基本为零，这由清洁能源技术的进步、严格气候政策的采纳或两者共同推动。本文探讨了这种预期中的需求下降对全球石油供应可能意味着什么。一种可能性是众所周知的“绿色悖论”：由于石油是一种可耗竭资源，生产商可能会加速近期开采以赶在需求下降之前。这种反应会增加近期的二氧化碳排放，甚至可能导致气候损害的总现值比需求根本没有下降时还要大。然而，由于石油开采需要对油井和其他基础设施进行可能长期的投资，相反的情况也可能发生：预期的需求下降会降低生产商的投资率，从而减少近期的石油产量和二氧化碳排放。为了评估这种投资减少效应是否超过绿色悖论，或者反之，我开发了一个易于处理的全球石油供应模型，该模型同时包含了这两种效应，并捕捉了行业特征，如异质性生产商、低成本欧佩克生产商行使市场力量以及边际钻井成本随钻井率上升。我发现，对于具有最强实证支持的模型输入，投资减少效应超过了传统的绿色悖论。为了使预期效应净增加全球累计石油开采量，我发现行业投资必须具有短时间视野，并且生产商的贴现率必须与美国国库券利率相当。

33206.title: Financial Conditions Targeting
33206.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Tomás E. Caravello, Alp Simsek
33206.abstract: We present evidence that noisy financial flows influence financial conditions and macroeconomic activity. How should monetary policy respond to this noise? We develop a model where it is optimal for the central bank to target and (partially) stabilize financial conditions beyond their direct effect on output and inflation gaps, even though stable financial conditions are not a social objective per se. In our model, noise affects both financial conditions and macroeconomic activity, and arbitrageurs are reluctant to trade against noise due to aggregate return volatility. Our main result shows that Financial Conditions Index (FCI) targeting—announcing a (soft and temporary) FCI target and setting the policy rate in the near future to maintain the actual FCI close to the target—reduces the FCI volatility and stabilizes the output gap. This improvement occurs because a more predictable FCI enables arbitrageurs to trade more aggressively against noise shocks, thereby "recruiting" them to insulate FCI from financial noise. FCI targeting is similar to providing forward guidance about the FCI, and in our framework it is strictly superior to providing forward guidance about the policy interest rate. Finally, we extend recent policy counterfactual methods to incorporate our model's endogenous risk reduction mechanism and apply it to U.S. data. We estimate that FCI targeting could have reduced the variance of the output gap, inflation, and interest rates by 36%, 2%, and 6%, respectively, and decreased the conditional variance of the FCI by 55%. When compared with interest rate forward guidance, it would have reduced output gap variance by 21%. We also show that a significant share of the gains from FCI targeting can be attained by an augmented version of a Taylor rule that gives a large weight to a simplified financial conditions target.
33206.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，有噪声的金融流动会影响金融状况和宏观经济活动。货币政策应如何应对这种噪声？我们开发了一个模型，在该模型中，央行最优的做法是瞄准并（部分）稳定金融状况，即使其超出了对产出和通胀缺口的直接影响，尽管稳定的金融状况本身并非社会目标。在我们的模型中，噪声同时影响金融状况和宏观经济活动，而套利者由于总体回报波动性而不愿逆噪声交易。我们的主要结果表明，金融状况指数目标制——宣布一个（软性的、临时的）金融状况指数目标，并在近期内设定政策利率以使实际金融状况指数接近目标——能够降低金融状况指数的波动性并稳定产出缺口。这种改善之所以发生，是因为更可预测的金融状况指数使套利者能够更积极地交易以对抗噪声冲击，从而“招募”他们来隔离金融状况指数免受金融噪声的影响。金融状况指数目标制类似于提供关于金融状况指数的前瞻指引，在我们的框架中，它严格优于提供关于政策利率的前瞻指引。最后，我们扩展了最近的政策反事实方法，以纳入我们模型的内生风险降低机制，并将其应用于美国数据。我们估计，金融状况指数目标制本可以使产出缺口、通胀和利率的方差分别降低36%、2%和6%，并使金融状况指数的条件方差降低55%。与利率前瞻指引相比，它本可以使产出缺口方差降低21%。我们还表明，金融状况指数目标制的大部分收益可以通过一个增强版的泰勒规则来实现，该规则对简化的金融状况目标赋予了较大权重。
33206.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E12, E32, E44, E52, G10

33205.title: Estimating Gross Output Production Functions
33205.abstract: This paper develops a novel method to estimate production functions. Earlier papers rely on special assumptions about the functional form of production functions. Our approach efficiently estimates all parameters of any production functions with Hicks-neutral productivity without additional exogenous variables or sources of variation in flexible input demand. We provide Monte Carlo Simulation evidence of our method’s performance and test our approach on empirical data from Chilean and Colombian manufacturing industries.
33205.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种估计生产函数的新方法。早期的论文依赖于关于生产函数函数形式的特殊假设。我们的方法有效地估计了任何具有希克斯中性生产率的生产函数的所有参数，无需额外的外生变量或灵活投入需求的变化来源。我们提供了蒙特卡洛模拟证据来证明我们方法的性能，并利用智利和哥伦比亚制造业的经验数据测试了我们的方法。

33204.title: From Novelty to Norm: Uncovering the Drivers of Virtual Tour Effectiveness in Real Estate Sales
33204.zh_title: 从新奇到常态：揭示虚拟看房在房地产销售中的有效性驱动因素
33204.abstract: This study examines the effectiveness of virtual tours and digital marketing strategies in enhancing real estate sales using a unique dataset combining MLS data, government-assessed property values, and agents’ marketing activities. While virtual tours are often perceived as a powerful tool to boost sales, their impact is context-dependent. Using classical econometric models and causal machine learning techniques, we find that virtual tours increase property sale prices by an average of 1%. However, the effect has declined over time, particularly post-COVID, indicating a shift from being a novel feature to a standard practice. Further analysis using causal random forests reveals significant heterogeneity in their effectiveness across property attributes, market conditions, and agent characteristics. Virtual tours are less impactful for highly differentiated properties but more beneficial in competitive markets and for less experienced agents who lack familiarity with the local market. These results suggest that real estate agents may benefit from considering property features, market dynamics, and their own experience when deciding how to use virtual tours. Our findings offer valuable insights for practitioners looking to optimize digital marketing strategies and enhance sales performance.
33204.zh_abstract: 本研究利用结合了多重上市服务数据、政府评估房产价值和经纪人营销活动的独特数据集，考察了虚拟看房和数字营销策略在提升房地产销售方面的有效性。虽然虚拟看房通常被视为促进销售的强大工具，但其影响取决于具体情境。使用经典计量经济学模型和因果机器学习技术，我们发现虚拟看房平均能使房产销售价格上涨1%。然而，这种效应随时间推移而减弱，尤其是在新冠疫情之后，表明它已从一项新颖功能转变为标准做法。使用因果随机森林的进一步分析揭示了其有效性在房产属性、市场条件和经纪人特征之间存在显著的异质性。虚拟看房对高度差异化的房产影响较小，但在竞争激烈的市场中以及对缺乏当地市场经验的新手经纪人更为有益。这些结果表明，房地产经纪人在决定如何使用虚拟看房时，或许应考虑房产特征、市场动态和自身经验。我们的发现为寻求优化数字营销策略和提升销售业绩的从业者提供了宝贵的见解。

33238.title: Assessing Assessors
33238.abstract: Property tax revenues – the largest discretionary source of revenue for local governments - adjust at a pace that is inconsistent with property values in the US. We show that this form of revenue smoothing may be rooted in the political economy of municipalities. Measures of local budget stressors are positively related to upward assessments of a property’s value. Moreover, municipalities are significantly more likely to reassess in up markets as opposed to down – consistent with maximizing tax base and revenue collected. Using micro-level evidence from just-passing school referenda in Illinois, these shocks to municipal liabilities lead to significant increases in property assessments without any associated increases in market values or transactions. Passing a referendum over the prior 3 years increases the probability that a house is reassessed upward by 23%. This flexible form of revenue smoothing creates avenues for personal rent extraction. We find that local tax assessors: 1) have tax assessments on their own properties significantly lower than neighboring properties; and 2) these tax assessments grow significantly slower than neighbors – lowering their tax bills. We further document a significant connection between the underassessment of tax assessors’ own properties and the tax-maximizing assessment gaps documented in the districts they operate.
33238.zh_abstract: 财产税收入——地方政府最大的可自由支配收入来源——其调整速度与美国房产价值不一致。我们表明，这种收入平滑形式可能根植于市政当局的政治经济学。地方预算压力指标与房产价值的上调评估正相关。此外，市政当局在上涨市场中比下跌市场中更有可能进行重新评估——这与最大化税基和征收收入一致。利用伊利诺伊州刚刚通过的学校公投的微观层面证据，这些对市政负债的冲击导致房产评估显著增加，而市场价值或交易量并未相应增加。在过去3年内通过公投，会使房屋被上调评估的概率增加23%。这种灵活的收入平滑形式为个人寻租创造了途径。我们发现，地方税务评估员：1）他们自己房产的税务评估显著低于邻近房产；2）这些税务评估的增长速度显著慢于邻居——从而降低了他们的税单。我们进一步记录了税务评估员自身房产的低估与其运营区域内记录在案的税收最大化评估差距之间存在显著关联。
33238.meta: Programs：AP, LE, PE, POL；JEL：G12, G18, H20, H23, H71, R38

33237.title: Hustling From Home? Work From Home Flexibility and Entrepreneurial Entry
33237.zh_title: 在家 hustling？居家办公灵活性与创业进入
33237.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg, Hanyi (Livia) Yi
33237.abstract: We investigate the influence of the growing trend of work-from-home (WFH) on new business formation, with a particular focus on the period surrounding the COVID-19 pandemic. At baseline, local new business entry is positively associated with the proportion of occupations amenable to telework in the region. Utilizing the advent of the COVID-19 pandemic and the implementation of stay-at-home mandates as an exogenous shock, we examine the effects of realized flexibility for WFH on entrepreneurial entry. While overall new business registrations increased following pandemic stay-at-home mandates, areas with an occupational mix that has higher potential for telework demonstrate less pronounced growth in new business formation, particularly in regions with lower economic demand factors. Survey evidence highlights how flexibility provided by traditional employment reduces entrepreneurial intent, especially for workers seeking non-pecuniary benefits such as autonomy or flexibility. Consistent with this substitution effect, we observe significant gender disparities, with a notable decline in women-led startups in areas with greater telework potential. Our results suggest a nuanced tension between the attractiveness of flexibility in traditional employment and the autonomy provided by entrepreneurial entry.
33237.zh_abstract: 我们调查了居家办公（WFH）日益增长的趋势对新企业创建的影响，特别关注COVID-19大流行前后时期。在基线水平上，当地新企业进入与该地区适合远程办公的职业比例正相关。利用COVID-19大流行的出现和居家令的实施作为外生冲击，我们检验了实现WFH灵活性对创业进入的影响。尽管在大流行居家令之后，新企业注册总数有所增加，但职业组合具有更高远程办公潜力的地区在新企业形成方面表现出不那么显著的增长，尤其是在经济需求因素较低的地区。调查证据强调了传统就业提供的灵活性如何降低创业意愿，特别是对于那些寻求非金钱利益（如自主权或灵活性）的工人。与这种替代效应一致，我们观察到显著的性别差异，在远程办公潜力较大的地区，女性领导的初创企业显著减少。我们的结果表明，传统就业的灵活性与创业进入提供的自主权之间存在微妙的张力。
33237.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：J10, J22, L26, M13

33236.title: A Practical Guide to Shift-Share Instruments
33236.zh_title: 份额-转移工具实用指南
33236.authors: Kirill Borusyak, Peter Hull, Xavier Jaravel
33236.abstract: A recent econometric literature shows two distinct paths for identification with shift-share instruments, leveraging either many exogenous shifts or exogenous shares. We present the core logic of both paths and practical takeaways via simple checklists. A variety of empirical settings illustrate key points.
33236.zh_abstract: 最近的计量经济学文献展示了使用份额-转移工具进行识别的两条不同路径，要么利用许多外生的转移份额，要么利用外生的份额。我们通过简单的检查清单展示了这两条路径的核心逻辑和实用要点。各种实证背景说明了关键点。
33236.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：C18, C21, C26, F16, J21, J61

33235.title: The Effects of Gender Integration on Men: Evidence from the U.S. Military
33235.zh_title: 性别融合对男性的影响：来自美国军方的证据
33235.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Melanie Wasserman, E. Anna Weber
33235.abstract: Do men negatively respond when women first enter an occupation? We answer this question by studying the end of one of the final explicit occupational barriers to women in the U.S.: in 2016, the U.S. military opened all positions to women, including historically male-only combat occupations. We exploit the staggered integration of women into combat units to estimate the causal effects of the introduction of female colleagues on men’s job performance, behavior, and perceptions of workplace quality, using monthly administrative personnel records and rich survey responses. We find that integrating women into previously all-male units does not negatively affect men’s performance or behavioral outcomes, including retention, promotions, demotions, separations for misconduct, criminal investigations, and medical conditions. Most of our results are precise enough to rule out small detrimental effects. However, there is a wedge between men’s perceptions and performance. The integration of women causes a negative shift in male soldiers’ perceptions of workplace quality. The decline is driven by units integrated with female officers, likely arising from men’s greater awareness of workplace problems or men’s dissatisfaction from working with women in positions of authority—even though men in such units show some performance gains. If male-dominated workplaces are reluctant to incorporate women due to expectations that men will become less productive, our paper provides evidence to weigh against that notion.
33235.zh_abstract: 当女性首次进入某个职业时，男性会做出负面反应吗？我们通过研究美国对女性最后一项明确的职业壁垒的终结来回答这个问题：2016年，美国军方向女性开放了所有职位，包括历史上仅限男性的战斗岗位。我们利用女性逐步融入战斗单位的过程，使用月度行政人事记录和丰富的调查回复，来估计引入女同事对男性工作表现、行为和工作场所质量感知的因果效应。我们发现，将女性融入先前全男性的单位并不会对男性的表现或行为结果产生负面影响，包括留任、晋升、降级、因不当行为离职、刑事调查和医疗状况。我们的大多数结果精确到足以排除微小的不利影响。然而，男性的感知与表现之间存在差距。女性的融入导致男性士兵对工作场所质量的感知发生负面转变。这种下降是由与女性军官融合的单位驱动的，可能源于男性对工作场所问题更强烈的意识，或者男性对与担任权威职位的女性共事的不满——尽管此类单位的男性在表现上有所提升。如果男性主导的工作场所因预期男性生产力下降而不愿接纳女性，我们的论文提供了反驳这一观点的证据。

33234.title: How Curvy is the Phillips Curve?
33234.authors: Philip Bunn, Lena Anayi, Emily Barnes, Nicholas Bloom, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
33234.abstract: Macro data suggest a convex relationship between inflation and economic slack, but identifying causality is challenging. Using micro data from large panel surveys of UK and US firms, we show that the response of prices to demand shocks is also convex at the firm level. We obtain similar results using three different empirical exercises examining: the impact of COVID demand shocks, the response to sales shocks, and hypothetical shocks from a survey experiment. This convexity is strongest in firms and industries with higher inflation, disappears at horizons beyond two years, and is also present in response to cost shocks. We rationalize these findings in a menu cost model with positive trend inflation and decreasing returns at the firm level, which replicates firm and aggregate Phillips curve convexity. The non-linearity emerges from trend inflation pushing firms closer to their price increase thresholds.
33234.zh_abstract: 宏观数据表明通胀与经济松弛之间存在凸性关系，但识别因果关系具有挑战性。利用来自英国和美国企业大型面板调查的微观数据，我们表明价格对需求冲击的反应在企业层面也是凸性的。我们通过三项不同的实证研究获得了类似的结果，这些研究考察了：COVID需求冲击的影响、对销售冲击的反应以及来自调查实验的假设冲击。这种凸性在通胀较高的企业和行业中最为强烈，在超过两年的期限后消失，并且在应对成本冲击时也存在。我们用一个具有正趋势通胀和企业层面递减回报的菜单成本模型来合理化这些发现，该模型复制了企业和总体菲利普斯曲线的凸性。这种非线性源于趋势通胀将企业推近其提价阈值。

33233.title: A Theory of How Workers Keep Up With Inflation
33233.zh_title: 工人如何跟上通胀的理论
33233.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Andrés Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Erik Hurst
33233.abstract: In this paper, we develop a model that combines elements of modern macro labor theories with nominal wage rigidities to study the consequences of unexpected inflation on the labor market. The slow and costly adjustment of real wages within a match after a burst of inflation incentivizes workers to engage in job-to-job transitions. Such dynamics after a surge in inflation lead to a rise in aggregate vacancies relative to unemployment, associating a seemingly tight labor market with lower average real wages. Calibrating with pre-2020 data, we show the model can simultaneously match the trends in worker flows and wage changes during the 2021-2024 period. Using historical data, we further show that prior periods of high inflation were also associated with an increase in vacancies and an upward shift in the Beveridge curve. Finally, we show that other “hot labor market” theories that can cause an increase in the aggregate vacancy-to-unemployment rate have implications that are inconsistent with the worker flows and wage dynamics observed during the recent inflationary period. Collectively, our calibrated model implies that the recent inflation in the United States, all else equal, reduced the welfare of workers through real wage declines and other costly actions, providing a model-driven reason why workers report they dislike inflation.
33233.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们开发了一个模型，该模型结合了现代宏观劳动理论的要素与名义工资刚性，以研究意外通胀对劳动力市场的影响。在通胀爆发后，匹配内部实际工资的缓慢且昂贵的调整激励工人进行工作间转换。通胀飙升后的这种动态导致相对于失业的总体职位空缺增加，将看似紧张的劳动力市场与较低的平均实际工资联系起来。使用2020年之前的数据进行校准，我们表明该模型可以同时匹配2021-2024年期间工人流动和工资变化的趋势。利用历史数据，我们进一步表明，先前的高通胀时期也与职位空缺增加和贝弗里奇曲线上移相关。最后，我们表明，其他可能导致总体职位空缺与失业率上升的“火热劳动力市场”理论，其含义与近期通胀期间观察到的工人流动和工资动态不一致。总的来说，我们校准后的模型意味着，美国近期的通胀，在其他条件相同的情况下，通过实际工资下降和其他代价高昂的行动降低了工人的福利，这提供了一个模型驱动的理由来解释为什么工人报告他们不喜欢通胀。
33233.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E31, J30, J63

33232.title: Halloween, ADHD, and Subjectivity in Medical Diagnosis
33232.zh_title: 万圣节、多动症与医学诊断中的主观性
33232.authors: Christopher Worsham, Charles Bray, Anupam Jena
33232.abstract: The practice of medicine relies on accurate diagnosis. However, the diagnosis of many medical conditions involves assessments that invite varying degrees of subjectivity. External and arbitrary factors can influence physicians’ diagnostic assessments in conditions ranging from heart attacks to neurodevelopmental conditions like attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD). Quantifying this subjectivity is challenging, however, particularly for neurodevelopmental and psychiatric conditions where subjective assessments of behavior are common and important. Halloween, a holiday characterized by excitement among children, could present a natural experiment to study subjectivity in diagnosis, if any ensuing behavioral changes influence diagnosis rates of ADHD. Using data on over 100 million physician office visits, we compared ADHD diagnosis rates, by day, among children seen by physicians in the 10 weekdays surrounding seven Halloween holidays. The rate of new ADHD diagnosis was 62.7 per 10,000 child-visits on Halloween, compared with 55.1 during surrounding weekdays, a 14% increase. There were no increases in diagnoses of several neuropsychiatric disorders with diagnostic criteria that are less focused on hyperactive behavior. Our findings highlight subjectivity in ADHD diagnosis and support the need to consider external factors that may influence diagnosis.
33232.zh_abstract: 医疗实践依赖于准确的诊断。然而，许多医疗状况的诊断涉及不同程度的评估主观性。从心脏病发作到注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）等神经发育状况，外部和任意因素都可能影响医生的诊断评估。然而，量化这种主观性颇具挑战性，尤其是对于神经发育和精神疾病，因为对行为的主观评估在这些领域常见且重要。万圣节是一个以儿童兴奋为特征的节日，如果由此产生的行为变化影响ADHD的诊断率，那么它可能为研究诊断中的主观性提供一个自然实验。利用超过1亿次医生门诊就诊的数据，我们比较了七个万圣节前后各10个工作日中，儿童在医生处就诊的ADHD诊断率（按天计算）。万圣节当天新ADHD诊断率为每万次儿童就诊62.7例，而前后工作日为55.1例，增加了14%。对于诊断标准较少关注多动行为的几种神经精神疾病，诊断率没有增加。我们的发现凸显了ADHD诊断中的主观性，并支持考虑可能影响诊断的外部因素的必要性。

33231.title: Are Some Angels Better than Others?
33231.zh_title: 有些天使投资者比其他的更好吗？
33231.authors: Johan Karlsen, Katja Kisseleva, Aksel Mjøs, David T. Robinson
33231.abstract: This paper provides novel, large-scale evidence on the returns to angel investing. Returns are extremely right-skewed: most lose money, the top one percent return more than fifty times invested capital, and the mean investment doubles invested capital. Investor-specific variation is an important part of overall variation in returns. Wealthier investors sort into better firms yet earn lower returns compared to other investors in those firms. Better performing angels have more startup-specific and industry knowledge, founder connections, and engage in active governance. These findings have implications for policies aimed at expanding early-stage finance.
33231.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于天使投资回报的新颖、大规模证据。回报呈极度右偏分布：大多数投资亏损，前1%的投资回报超过投资资本的50倍，平均投资使资本翻倍。投资者个体差异是回报总体差异的重要组成部分。较富裕的投资者能筛选出更好的公司，但与这些公司中的其他投资者相比，他们获得的回报却较低。表现更好的天使投资者拥有更多创业特定知识和行业知识、创始人关系，并积极参与公司治理。这些发现对旨在扩大早期融资的政策具有启示意义。

33230.title: You Can Take Them With You: Recruiting Coworkers to One's Own New Firm
33230.zh_title: 你可以带走他们：招募前同事加入自己的新公司
33230.authors: Marc-Andreas Muendler, James E. Rauch, Sergio Mikio Koyama
33230.abstract: New firms do not yet have employees who can aid recruiting by referrals, but entrepreneurs can recruit workers they know to their startups—in effect making their own referrals. We consider new firms in Brazil’s formal sector founded between 2002 and 2014, for which at least one founding owner can be traced to previous formal employment. We find that 35.1 percent of new firms with at least five employees hire one or more coworkers from a founding owner’s last employer in their first year of operation, and that 9.2 percent of first-year hires at new firms were coworkers at a founding owner’s last employer. The former coworkers most likely to join a founding owner’s new firm are those who, at their last employer, worked in the same plant as a founding owner, had long overlap with a founding owner, were classified in the same industry or occupation as a founding owner, and were hired at roughly the same time as a founding owner. Controlling for observable human capital and new firm fixed effects, former coworkers earn eight percent higher initial wages at new firms and are six percentage points less likely to separate before a new firm’s second year of operation. We find that the coworker wage premium diminishes with tenure by 0.5 percentage points per year and the coworker separation premium diminishes with tenure by 2.0 percentage points per year.
33230.zh_abstract: 新公司尚未拥有能通过推荐协助招聘的员工，但企业家可以招募他们认识的人加入自己的初创企业——实际上是自己进行推荐。我们研究了2002年至2014年间在巴西正规部门成立的新公司，这些公司至少有一位创始所有者可追溯到之前的正规就业记录。我们发现，在至少有五名员工的新公司中，35.1%在运营第一年从创始所有者上一家雇主处招募了一名或多名前同事，并且新公司第一年招聘的员工中有9.2%曾是创始所有者上一家雇主处的同事。最有可能加入创始所有者新公司的前同事是那些在上一家雇主处与创始所有者同厂工作、与创始所有者有长期共事经历、与创始所有者属于同一行业或职业、以及与创始所有者大致同时被雇佣的人。在控制了可观测的人力资本和新公司固定效应后，前同事在新公司获得的初始工资高出8%，并且在公司运营第二年之前离职的可能性低6个百分点。我们发现，前同事的工资溢价每年随任期减少0.5个百分点，而离职优势每年随任期减少2.0个百分点。

33229.title: Why Aren't There More Minority Entrepreneurs?
33229.zh_title: 为什么少数族裔企业家更少？
33229.authors: Victor M. Bennett, David T. Robinson
33229.abstract: We study racial and gender disparities in entrepreneurial activity through the lens of a Roy model, focusing on the distinction between idea generation and execution. Using nationally representative sur-vey data, we find that Black and Hispanic individuals demonstrate higher entrepreneurial intentions than white respondents. They are much less likely, however, to launch ventures once ideas are conceived. A critical determinant of this gap is differential reliance on social networks, which shapes both the likelihood of launching a business as well as the reasons for stopping. Variation in the strength of local, own-group entrepreneurship reveals that stronger networks enhance the relationship between social engagement and business formation. Also, as predicted by the model, access to social networks also predicts seeking capital. The interconnections between socialization and searching for capital are important for understanding-policies aimed at boosting rates of entrepreneurship in underrepresented groups.
33229.zh_abstract: 我们通过罗伊模型的视角研究创业活动中的种族和性别差异，重点关注创意产生与执行之间的区别。利用具有全国代表性的调查数据，我们发现黑人和西班牙裔受访者表现出比白人受访者更高的创业意愿。然而，一旦创意形成，他们启动创业的可能性却低得多。这一差距的一个关键决定因素是对社交网络的依赖程度不同，这既影响创业的可能性，也影响放弃创业的原因。本地同族裔创业强度的差异表明，更强的网络能增强社交参与与创业形成之间的关系。此外，正如模型所预测的，社交网络的可得性也预示着寻求资本的行为。社交化与寻求资本之间的相互联系对于理解旨在提高代表性不足群体创业率的政策至关重要。

33228.title: A Market Interpretation of Treatment Effects
33228.abstract: Markets, likened to an invisible hand, often appear to contradict econometric assumptions that rule out spillovers of one person’s treatment on another’s outcomes. This paper provides a simple statistical framework highlighting that controls are indirectly affected by the treatment through the market. Further, the effect of the treatment on the treated reveals only part of the consequence for the treated of treating the entire market. When combined with economic theory, our framework leads to a new application of Marshall’s Laws of Derived Demand that relates econometric estimates of treatment effects in the marketplace to the substitution and scale effects of demand theory. We show how treatment-effect estimators can diverge – both in magnitude and direction – from the causal effects of treatment on the treated or counterfactual policies treating all market participants. The framework shows how the consequences of targeted treatments reveal the effects of marketwide treatments, and the role of market frictions in that inference. Examples from labor, public finance, economic geography, development, and the macro literature on the “missing intercept” are provided.
33228.zh_abstract: 市场常被比作一只看不见的手，这似乎与排除一个人处理对另一个人结果产生溢出效应的计量经济学假设相矛盾。本文提供了一个简单的统计框架，强调对照组通过市场间接受到处理的影响。此外，处理对受处理者的效应仅揭示了处理整个市场对受处理者后果的一部分。当与经济理论结合时，我们的框架引出了马歇尔派生需求定律的一个新应用，该应用将市场中处理效应的计量经济学估计与需求理论的替代效应和规模效应联系起来。我们展示了处理效应估计量如何在幅度和方向上偏离处理对受处理者的因果效应，或偏离处理所有市场参与者的反事实政策效应。该框架展示了针对性处理的后果如何揭示市场范围处理的效果，以及市场摩擦在这种推断中的作用。文中提供了来自劳动经济学、公共财政、经济地理学、发展经济学以及关于“缺失截距”的宏观文献中的例子。

33227.title: Minimum Viable Signal: Venture Funding, Social Movements, and Race
33227.zh_title: 最小可行信号：风险投资、社会运动与种族
33227.authors: Matt Marx, Qian Wang, Emmanuel Yimfor
33227.abstract: How do venture capital investors react to social movements, including those that relate to historical underrepresentation in funding? We use image and name algorithms combined with clerical review to classify race for 150,000 founders and 30,000 investors. These data allow us to assess the impact of George Floyd’s murder on VC funding of Black entrepreneurs and identify which VCs were most responsive. Although VCs responded swiftly, investment in Black-founded startups reverted to prior levels within two years. This temporary reaction was concentrated among those who had never previously invested in any Black entrepreneur. Moreover, the investors who responded were less likely to invest in more than one Black-founded startup and were less inclined to engage deeply by taking a board seat. Finally, it appears that the best Black entrepreneurs may have anticipated this “token” response, as they did not match with investors who had no experience funding Black startups.
33227.zh_abstract: 风险投资者如何应对社会运动，包括那些与历史上在融资中代表性不足相关的运动？我们使用图像和姓名算法结合文书审查，对15万名创始人和3万名投资者进行了种族分类。这些数据使我们能够评估乔治·弗洛伊德谋杀案对黑人企业家风险投资的影响，并识别出哪些风险投资者反应最为积极。尽管风险投资者迅速做出了反应，但对黑人创办的初创企业的投资在两年内恢复到了之前的水平。这种暂时性的反应集中在那些此前从未投资过任何黑人企业家的投资者身上。此外，做出反应的投资者投资超过一家黑人创办的初创企业的可能性较低，并且不太倾向于通过担任董事会席位来深入参与。最后，最好的黑人企业家可能已经预见到了这种“象征性”回应，因为他们没有与那些没有投资黑人初创企业经验的投资者进行匹配。

33226.title: Investor Memory and Biased Beliefs: Evidence from the Field
33226.zh_title: 投资者记忆与有偏信念：来自田野的证据
33226.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hongqi Liu, Cameron Peng, Hongjun Yan
33226.abstract: We survey a large, representative sample of retail investors in China to elicit their memories of stock market investments and their return expectations. We merge this survey data with administrative transaction data to test a model in which investors selectively recall past experiences to form their beliefs. Our analysis uncovers new facts about investor memory and highlights similarity-based recall as a novel mechanism of belief formation in financial markets. A rising market prompts investors to recall their past experiences more positively, leading to more optimistic forecasts of future returns. Recalled experiences explain a sizable fraction of cross-investor variation in return expectations and dominate actual experiences in their explanatory power. In the transaction data, we confirm that recalled experiences affect investors' trading decisions through a belief channel.
33226.zh_abstract: 我们对中国一个大型、具有代表性的散户投资者样本进行了调查，以引出他们对股票市场投资的记忆和回报预期。我们将这些调查数据与管理交易数据合并，以检验一个模型，在该模型中，投资者选择性回忆过去的经历来形成他们的信念。我们的分析揭示了关于投资者记忆的新事实，并强调了基于相似性的回忆作为金融市场信念形成的一种新机制。上涨的市场促使投资者更积极地回忆过去的经历，导致对未来回报的预测更加乐观。回忆起的经历解释了投资者间回报预期差异的相当大一部分，并且在解释力上超过了实际经历。在交易数据中，我们证实回忆起的经历通过信念渠道影响投资者的交易决策。

33225.title: Valuing Policy Characteristics and New Products using a Simple Linear Program
33225.zh_title: 使用简单线性规划评估政策特征和新产品
33225.abstract: The Random Utility Model (RUM) is a workhorse model for valuing new products or changes in public goods. But RUMs have been faulted along two lines. First, for including idiosyncratic errors that imply unreasonably high values for new alternatives and unrealistic substitution patterns. Second, for involving strong restrictions on functional forms for utility. This paper shows how, instead, starting with a revealed preference framework, one can partially identify nonparametrically the answers to policy questions about discrete alternatives. When the Generalized Axiom of Revealed Preference (GARP) is satisfied, the approach weakly identifies a pure characteristics model. When GARP is violated, it recasts the RUM errors as departures from GARP (critical cost efficiency), to be minimized using a minimum-distance criterion. This perspective provides an alternative avenue for nonparametric identification of discrete choice models. The paper illustrates the approach by estimating bounds on the values of ecological improvements in the Southern Appalachian Mountains using survey data.
33225.zh_abstract: 随机效用模型（RUM）是评估新产品或公共物品变化价值的工作母机模型。但RUM在两个方面受到批评。首先，它包含了意味着新替代方案价值过高和替代模式不现实的异质性误差。其次，它对效用函数形式施加了严格限制。本文展示了如何从显示性偏好框架出发，非参数地部分识别关于离散替代方案的政策问题的答案。当满足显示性偏好广义公理（GARP）时，该方法弱识别了一个纯特征模型。当GARP被违反时，它将RUM误差重新解释为对GARP（临界成本效率）的偏离，并使用最小距离准则将其最小化。这一视角为离散选择模型的非参数识别提供了另一种途径。本文通过使用调查数据估计南阿巴拉契亚山脉生态改善价值的边界来说明该方法。
33225.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：C14, C25, C61, D12, Q51

33224.title: Business Applications as a Leading Economic Indicator?
33224.zh_title: 商业申请作为领先经济指标？
33224.authors: Jose Asturias, Emin Dinlersoz, John C. Haltiwanger, Rebecca J. Hutchinson, Alyson Plumb
33224.abstract: How are applications to start new businesses related to aggregate economic activity? This paper explores the properties of three monthly business application series from the U.S. Census Bureau’s Business Formation Statistics as economic indicators: all business applications, business applications that are relatively likely to turn into new employer businesses (“likely employers”), and the residual series -- business applications that have a relatively low rate of becoming employers (“likely non-employers”). Growth in applications for likely employers significantly leads total nonfarm employment growth and has a strong positive correlation with it. Furthermore, growth in applications for likely employers leads growth in most of the monthly Principal Federal Economic Indicators (PFEIs). Motivated by our findings, we estimate a dynamic factor model (DFM) to forecast nonfarm employment growth over a 12-month period using the PFEIs and the likely employers series. The latter improves the model’s forecast, especially in the years following the turning points of the Great Recession and the COVID-19 pandemic. Overall, applications for likely employers are a strong leading indicator of monthly PFEIs and aggregate economic activity, whereas applications for likely non-employers provide early information about changes in increasingly prevalent self-employment activity in the U.S. economy.
33224.zh_abstract: 创办新企业的申请与总体经济活动有何关联？本文探讨了美国人口普查局商业形成统计中的三个月度商业申请序列作为经济指标的特性：所有商业申请、相对可能转变为新雇主企业的商业申请（“潜在雇主”），以及剩余序列——成为雇主概率较低的商业申请（“潜在非雇主”）。潜在雇主申请的增长显著领先于非农就业总人数的增长，并与之呈强正相关。此外，潜在雇主申请的增长领先于大多数月度主要联邦经济指标（PFEIs）的增长。基于我们的发现，我们估计了一个动态因子模型（DFM），利用PFEIs和潜在雇主序列来预测12个月内的非农就业增长。后者改善了模型的预测能力，尤其是在大衰退和新冠疫情转折点之后的年份。总体而言，潜在雇主的申请是月度PFEIs和总体经济活动的强领先指标，而潜在非雇主的申请则提供了美国经济中日益普遍的自主创业活动变化的早期信息。

33223.title: Gender Composition and Group Behavior: Evidence from US City Councils
33223.zh_title: 性别构成与群体行为：来自美国市议会的证据
33223.authors: Emilia Brito Rebolledo, Jesse Bruhn, Thea How Choon, E. Anna Weber
33223.abstract: How does gender composition influence individual and group behavior? To study this question empirically, we assembled a new, national sample of United States city council elections and digitized information from the minutes of over 40,000 city-council meetings. We find that replacing a male councilor with a female councilor results in a 25p.p. increase in the share of motions proposed by women. This is despite causing only a 20p.p. increase in the council female share. The discrepancy is driven, in part, by behavioral changes similar to those documented in laboratory-based studies of gender composition. When a lone woman is joined by a female colleague, she participates more actively by proposing more motions. The apparent changes in behavior do not translate into clear differences in spending. The null finding on spending is not driven by strategic voting; however, preference alignment on local policy issues between men and women appears to play an important role. Taken together, our results both highlight the importance of nominal representation for cultivating substantive participation by women in high-stakes decision making bodies; and also provide evidence in support of the external validity of a large body of laboratory-based work on the consequences of group gender composition.
33223.zh_abstract: 性别构成如何影响个人和群体行为？为了实证研究这个问题，我们收集了一个新的全国性美国市议会选举样本，并数字化了超过40,000次市议会会议的会议记录信息。我们发现，用一名女议员替换一名男议员会导致女性提出的动议比例增加25个百分点。尽管这仅使议会中女性比例增加了20个百分点。这种差异部分源于类似于实验室性别构成研究中记录的行为变化。当一名孤立女性有了一位女同事时，她会通过提出更多动议而更积极地参与。行为上的明显变化并未转化为支出上的明确差异。支出方面的零结果并非由策略性投票导致；然而，男女在地方政策问题上的偏好一致性似乎起着重要作用。综合来看，我们的结果既突显了名义代表性对于培养女性在高风险决策机构中实质性参与的重要性；也提供了证据支持大量关于群体性别构成后果的实验室研究的外部有效性。

33222.title: Is Swedish Household Debt Too High? Solvency, Liquidity, and Debt-Financed Overconsumption
33222.zh_title: 瑞典家庭债务过高吗？偿付能力、流动性与债务融资的过度消费
33222.abstract:
Swedish authorities and international organizations that monitor and comment on Swedish economic policy have argued that Swedish household debt is too high and a threat to financial and macroeconomic stability (FMS). But household debt may become a threat to FMS under essentially three conditions: (1) Households’ debt becomes too high relative to household assets; households’ solvency is not good. (2) Households’ debt service becomes too high relative to incomes and payment capacity; households’ liquidity is not good. (3) Households use home-equity withdrawals (HEWs)—made possible by rising housing prices—to finance an unsustainable overconsumption of macroeconomic significance. 
The analysis covers both the borrowers of the total stock of mortgages and the new borrowers of new mortgages, not—as is common in Sweden—only the new borrowers and the new mortgages. The total stock is much larger, its borrowers are many more, and they matter much more for FMS than the new mortgages and the new borrowers. 
Two structural features mitigate risks from the Swedish household debt. First, on a closer look, mortgages are in fact a safe cash cow for banks and contribute to financial stability. Second, the mortgage rates are not exogenous but indirectly controlled by the Riksbank and its policy rate. The Riksbank sets the policy rate to maintain macroeconomic stability and to contribute to financial stability. 
Regarding condition (1), aggregate household assets are much larger and have grown much faster than the debt. Net wealth was twice the debt in 1985, five times the debt in 2024. LTV ratios among the borrowers of the mortgage stock are much smaller than those among the new borrowers. A full 78% of the borrowers of the stock have home equity exceeding 30%, which is more than any housing-price fall during the last 50 years. Solvency is good. Regarding condition (2), the debt service of the borrowers of the stock is not high relative to incomes and substantially lower than that of the new borrowers, because lower loan-to-income and LTV ratios imply that both interest and amortization payments are lower. Liquidity is good. Regarding condition (3), there is no indication that there is any debt-financed overconsumption (undersaving) of macroeconomic significance. The HEW recorded by the Swedish FSA is not unusually high, the saving rate is close to a historical high, and the share of durable consumption in total consumption expenditures is normal. 
Thus, none of the three conditions is present. Swedish household debt is neither too high nor a threat to financial and macroeconomic stability.
33222.zh_abstract: 瑞典当局以及监测和评论瑞典经济政策的国际组织认为，瑞典家庭债务过高，对金融和宏观经济稳定构成威胁。但家庭债务可能成为金融和宏观经济稳定威胁的条件主要有三个：(1) 家庭债务相对于家庭资产过高；家庭偿付能力不佳。(2) 家庭偿债额相对于收入和支付能力过高；家庭流动性不佳。(3) 家庭利用房价上涨带来的房屋净值提取来资助具有宏观经济意义的不可持续的过度消费。
33222.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E52, G01, G21, G28, G51

33221.title: Search Costs, Intermediation, and Trade: Experimental Evidence from Ugandan Agricultural Markets
33221.zh_title: 搜索成本、中介与贸易：来自乌干达农产品市场的实验证据
33221.authors: Lauren F. Bergquist, Craig McIntosh, Meredith Startz
33221.abstract: We study the large-scale experimental rollout of a platform that reduced search and matching frictions in Ugandan agricultural markets by connecting buyers and sellers. Market integration improved substantially: trade increased and price gaps fell. Interpreting the experiment through a trade model, we estimate treatment effects accounting for equilibrium changes that impact control markets. The intervention reduced fixed trade costs by 21% and increased trade flows between treated markets by 6% and across all markets by 1%. Scale economies shaped engagement: few farmers used the platform, but equilibrium price convergence from improved arbitrage by larger traders passed through to farm revenue.
33221.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个大规模实验性推广的平台，该平台通过连接买卖双方减少了乌干达农产品市场中的搜索和匹配摩擦。市场整合显著改善：贸易增加，价格差距缩小。通过贸易模型解读该实验，我们估计了处理效应，并考虑了影响对照市场的均衡变化。该干预措施将固定贸易成本降低了21%，使处理市场之间的贸易流量增加了6%，所有市场之间的贸易流量增加了1%。规模经济影响了参与度：很少有农民使用该平台，但大型贸易商套利改善带来的均衡价格趋同传导至了农场收入。

33220.title: Tearing the Paper Ceiling: The Impact of State Commitments to Remove Degree Requirements on Public Awareness and Job Opportunities for STARs
33220.zh_title: 撕破纸天花板：州政府承诺取消学位要求对STARs公众认知和就业机会的影响
33220.authors: Justin Heck, Blair Corcoran de Castillo, Peter Q. Blair, Papia Debroy
33220.abstract: In the past two years, 25 states have enacted executive orders and legislation to reduce unnecessary degree requirements for public sector jobs, signaling a shift toward skill-based hiring. This paper examines the impact of these policy commitments on public perceptions, media coverage, and job posting practices in the time following their adoption. Our analysis reveals significant increases in public awareness of skill-based hiring concepts, such as the 'paper ceiling' (i.e., bachelor’s degree analog of the glass ceiling), and a notable decline in bachelor’s degree requirements in state government job postings. We estimate that degree requirements dropped by 2.5 percentage points for each additional year of policy exposure in states with commitments. These findings suggest that state policy commitments have expanded access to government jobs for workers skilled through alternative routes (STARs) other than the bachelor’s degree in keeping with the intended goals of the policies to broaden the talent pool for public sector hiring.
33220.zh_abstract: 在过去两年中，25个州颁布了行政命令和立法，以减少公共部门职位不必要的学位要求，标志着向技能型招聘的转变。本文考察了这些政策承诺在采纳后对公众认知、媒体报道和职位发布实践的影响。我们的分析显示，公众对技能型招聘概念（如“纸天花板”，即学士学位版的玻璃天花板）的认知显著提高，州政府职位发布中对学士学位的要求显著下降。我们估计，在有承诺的州，每增加一年的政策暴露，学位要求下降2.5个百分点。这些发现表明，州政策承诺扩大了通过学士学位以外的替代途径获得技能的工人（STARs）获得政府工作的机会，符合政策旨在拓宽公共部门招聘人才库的目标。

33219.title: Careers and Wages in Family Firms: Evidence from Matched Employer-Employee Data
33219.zh_title: 家族企业中的职业与工资：来自匹配雇主-雇员数据的证据
33219.authors: Edoardo Di Porto, Marco Pagano, Vincenzo Pezone, Raffaele Saggio, Fabiano Schivardi
33219.abstract: We investigate compensation policies in family and non-family firms using a novel employer-employee matched dataset comprising nearly the universe of Italian incorporated firms and ownership information. Family firms pay significantly lower wages and offer slower and less rewarding careers. Differences in worker sorting account for half of the wage gap while productivity differences and compensating differentials explain little of the residual gap. The wage distribution in family firms is more compressed, with infrequent promotions. We rationalize this evidence with a model where family owners seek to maintain control, creating a “glass ceiling” that limits their employees’ career progression.
33219.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个新颖的雇主-雇员匹配数据集（包含几乎所有意大利注册公司及其所有权信息）研究了家族企业与非家族企业的薪酬政策。家族企业支付的工资显著较低，并提供更慢且回报更低的职业发展。工人分类差异解释了工资差距的一半，而生产率差异和补偿性差异对剩余差距的解释力很小。家族企业中的工资分布更为压缩，晋升频率较低。我们将这一证据合理化，构建了一个模型，其中家族所有者寻求保持控制权，从而形成了限制员工职业发展的“玻璃天花板”。
33219.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G30, G38, J01, J30, J31

33218.title: Growth and Fluctuations: An Overview
33218.abstract: Capitalism since its inception has been marked by large fluctuations. The resulting episodic unemployment has been very costly. This paper provides an overview of alternative theories. Standard models (such as DSGE) have not provided insights into the causes of the fluctuations and the shocks buffeting the economy, which contrary to what they assume, are largely endogenous; they have not provided an understanding of how and why the economy amplifies shocks and makes their effects at times so persistent or how and why there may be oscillatory behavior, rather than a smooth convergence back to some (temporary) equilibrium. Accordingly, they do not give guidance on how to make deep downturns—those that really matter—less frequent, shallower, and less costly. By contrast, there are alternative, new models, often building on older Keynesian foundations, with heterogenous capital goods and heterogeneous agents, interacting with each other in imperfect markets and fragile networks, with endogenous innovation in an ever-evolving economy, with deep uncertainty. These theories, with endogenously driven fluctuations, provide greater insights in the causes and nature of fluctuations, and better policy guidance.
33218.zh_abstract: 资本主义自诞生以来就伴随着巨大的波动。由此产生的间歇性失业代价高昂。本文提供了替代理论的概述。标准模型（如DSGE）未能洞察波动的成因以及冲击经济体的因素——这些因素与它们的假设相反，在很大程度上是内生的；它们未能理解经济如何以及为何放大冲击并使其影响有时如此持久，或者经济如何以及为何可能出现振荡行为，而非平滑收敛回某个（暂时的）均衡。因此，它们没有就如何使深度衰退——那些真正重要的衰退——更不频繁、更浅且代价更低提供指导。相比之下，存在替代性的新模型，通常建立在较老的凯恩斯主义基础上，具有异质性资本品和异质性主体，在不完善市场和脆弱网络中相互作用，在持续演变的经济中具有内生创新，并面临深度不确定性。这些具有内生驱动波动的理论，为波动的成因和性质提供了更深刻的见解，并提供了更好的政策指导。
33218.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM；JEL：C62, D84, E12, E32, E44, N30

33263.title: Federal Reserve Structure, Economic Ideas, and Banking Policy During the “Quiet Period” in Banking
33263.zh_title: 美联储结构、经济思想与银行业“平静期”的银行政策
33263.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Edward S. Prescott
33263.abstract: We evaluate the decentralized structure of the Federal Reserve System as a mechanism for generating and processing new ideas on banking policy in the 1950s and 1960s. We document that demand for research and analysis was driven by banking industry developments and legal changes that required the Federal Reserve and other banking regulatory agencies to develop guidelines for bank mergers. In response to these developments, the Board and the Reserve Banks hired industrial organization economists and young economists out of graduate school who brought in the leading theory of industrial organization at the time, which was the structure, conduct, and performance (SCP) paradigm. This flow of ideas into the Federal Reserve from academia paralleled the flow that was going on in monetary policy and macroeconomics at the time and contributed to the increased professionalization of research at the Federal Reserve. We document how several Reserve Banks, particularly Boston and Chicago, innovated by creating dissertation support programs, collecting specialized data, and creating the Bank Structure Conference, which became the clearinghouse for academic work on bank structure and later for bank risk and financial stability. We interpret these examples as illustrating an advantage that a decentralized central bank has in the production of knowledge.
33263.zh_abstract: 我们评估了美联储系统的分散化结构，将其视为20世纪50年代和60年代银行政策新思想的生成和处理机制。我们记录到，对研究和分析的需求是由银行业发展和法律变化驱动的，这些变化要求美联储和其他银行监管机构为银行合并制定指导方针。为应对这些发展，美联储理事会和储备银行聘请了产业组织经济学家和刚从研究生院毕业的年轻经济学家，他们带来了当时领先的产业组织理论，即结构、行为和绩效（SCP）范式。这种思想从学术界流入美联储的过程，与当时货币政策与宏观经济学领域的思想流动并行，并促进了美联储研究专业化的提升。我们记录了多家储备银行（尤其是波士顿和芝加哥）如何通过创建论文支持项目、收集专门数据以及举办银行结构会议进行创新，该会议后来成为银行结构学术工作以及后来银行风险和金融稳定的信息交流中心。我们将这些例子解释为分散化中央银行在知识生产方面具有的优势。

33262.title: Rules vs. Discretion: Decoding FOMC Policy Deliberations
33262.zh_title: 规则与自由裁量：解读FOMC政策审议
33262.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Klodiana Istrefi, Humberto Martínez
33262.abstract: This study provides evidence on the usage and preferences of Federal Reserves Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) regarding the balance between rules and discretion in policy decisions. Analyzing FOMC transcripts over 40 years, we find that while Discretion has been a consistent feature in the language of the FOMC, the use of the language of Rules surged notably in the mid-1990s, aligning with theoretical advancements in monetary policy. We identify that a rise in Discretion terminology occurs during economic downturns and periods of heightened uncertainty. In contrast, a rise in the language of Rules is supported by higher references to terms such as credibility and commitment, and is more prevalent among hawkish FOMC members. Our findings link the increased use of the language of Rules (Discretion) to tighter (easier) monetary policy, revealing a significant role of this debate in shaping policy outcomes, in particular periods.
33262.zh_abstract: 本研究提供了关于美联储联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）在政策决策中规则与自由裁量平衡的使用和偏好的证据。通过分析40年间的FOMC会议记录，我们发现，虽然自由裁量一直是FOMC语言中的一贯特征，但规则语言的使用在20世纪90年代中期显著增加，这与货币政策的理论进展相一致。我们识别出，自由裁量术语的增加发生在经济衰退和不确定性加剧时期。相比之下，规则语言的增加得到了对可信度和承诺等术语更多提及的支持，并且在鹰派FOMC成员中更为普遍。我们的发现将规则（自由裁量）语言使用的增加与更紧缩（更宽松）的货币政策联系起来，揭示了这一辩论在特定时期对政策结果形成的重要作用。

33261.title: Beliefs of Others: an Experiment
33261.abstract: We study how people think others update their beliefs upon encountering new evidence. We find that when two individuals share the same prior, one believes that new evidence cannot systematically shift the other’s beliefs in either direction (Martingale property). When the two have different priors, people think that any information brings others’ expected posteriors closer to their own prior, but this adjustment is less responsive to information quality than theory predicts. We identify the primary cause of this insensitivity and discuss the implications of our findings for strategic games with asymmetric information, information design, and, more broadly, for understanding societal polarization.
33261.zh_abstract: 我们研究人们如何认为他人在遇到新证据时更新自己的信念。我们发现，当两个人拥有相同的先验信念时，一个人认为新证据不会系统性地将另一个人的信念向任一方向偏移（鞅性质）。当两人拥有不同的先验信念时，人们认为任何信息都会使他人的预期后验信念更接近自己的先验信念，但这种调整对信息质量的敏感度低于理论预测。我们识别了这种不敏感性的主要原因，并讨论了我们的发现对非对称信息下的策略博弈、信息设计以及更广泛地理解社会两极分化的启示。

33260.title: Cracks in the Glass Ceiling and Gender Equality: Do Exports Shatter the Glass Ceiling?
33260.zh_title: 玻璃天花板的裂缝与性别平等：出口是否打破了玻璃天花板？
33260.authors: Bruno César Araújo, Lourenço S. Paz, James E. West
33260.abstract: Do female managers improve workplace outcomes for female employees? The evidence is mixed. We use Brazilian administrative employer-employee matched data over the large and unanticipated 1999 Brazilian real exchange rate devaluation and find that the share of female employees grows in female-led firms, but the male-female wage gap grows in both female- and male-led firms. This behavior is inconsistent with both theoretical models of taste-based employer discrimination and third-degree oligopsonistic labor markets by gender. Outcomes only differ between female- and male-led firms regarding managerial and supervisory employees, where female-led firms hire more female managerial and supervisory employees, yet the gender wage gap widens relative to male-led firms. We conclude that exports further crack the glass ceiling in female-led firms, though at the cost of a more expansive gender wage gap.
33260.zh_abstract: 女性管理者是否改善了女性员工的工作场所结果？证据是混杂的。我们利用巴西1999年大规模且出乎意料的雷亚尔贬值期间的行政雇主-雇员匹配数据，发现女性领导的企业中女性员工比例增长，但在女性和男性领导的企业中，男女工资差距都在扩大。这种行为与基于偏好的雇主歧视理论和按性别划分的三级寡头垄断劳动力市场模型都不一致。女性和男性领导的企业之间的结果差异仅体现在管理和监督员工方面，女性领导的企业雇佣了更多的女性管理和监督员工，然而与男性领导的企业相比，性别工资差距却扩大了。我们得出结论，出口进一步打破了女性领导企业中的玻璃天花板，但代价是性别工资差距的扩大。

33259.title: Breaking Barriers to Financial Access: Cross-Platform Digital Payments and Credit Markets
33259.zh_title: 打破金融准入壁垒：跨平台数字支付与信贷市场
33259.authors: Shashwat Alok, Pulak Ghosh, Nirupama Kulkarni, Manju Puri
33259.abstract: Can cross-platform digital payments improve credit access at scale? We study this question using India’s launch of the Unified Payments Interface (UPI), a nationwide cross-platform payment system. Using rarely available data on the universe of consumer loans, we show that digital payments increased financial deepening, allowing new borrowers to access formal credit. Banks mainly expanded lending to prime borrowers, while fintechs served all borrower segments—but only fintechs extended credit to new-to-credit customers. Credit growth was strongest in regions with affordable internet and recent bank account penetration. We find no evidence that this expansion increased default rates.
33259.zh_abstract: 跨平台数字支付能否大规模改善信贷准入？我们利用印度推出的统一支付接口（UPI）——一个全国性的跨平台支付系统——来研究这个问题。利用罕见的消费者贷款全量数据，我们表明数字支付增加了金融深化，使新借款人能够获得正规信贷。银行主要向优质借款人扩大贷款，而金融科技公司服务于所有借款人群体——但只有金融科技公司向无信贷记录的新客户提供信贷。信贷增长在互联网价格可负担且近期银行账户普及率高的地区最为强劲。我们没有发现证据表明这种扩张增加了违约率。
33259.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, ME, PE；JEL：D14, G24, G28, G51, J15, R21, R23, R31

33258.title: Knowledge Suppression and Resilience under Censorship: Three-century Book Publications in China
33258.zh_title: 审查制度下的知识压制与韧性：中国三个世纪的图书出版
33258.authors: Ying Bai, Ruixue Jia, Jiaojiao Yang
33258.abstract: This study examines the short-, medium-, and long-term impacts of state censorship on knowledge production, focusing on the largest book-banning campaign in Chinese history, initiated during the compilation of the 'Siku Quanshu' (Complete Library in Four Sections) between 1772 and 1783. Analyzing publication data from over 161,000 books spanning the 1660s to the 1940s, we find that categories subjected to stricter censorship experienced significant declines in publication during the seven decades following the bans (1770s–1830s). However, beginning in the 1840s, political upheavals and the erosion of state control triggered a resurgence of publications in previously restricted categories. This pattern of suppression and recovery extends to ideas, as evidenced by keyword analysis of book titles. Further analysis highlights the central role of chilling effects in driving these dynamics, with the exit and entry of publishers playing a crucial role in both the suppression and subsequent revival of knowledge production.
33258.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了国家审查对知识生产的短期、中期和长期影响，重点关注中国历史上最大规模的禁书运动，该运动始于1772年至1783年间《四库全书》的编纂。通过分析从1660年代到1940年代超过16.1万本书的出版数据，我们发现，在禁令实施后的七十年间（1770年代至1830年代），受到更严格审查的类别出版量显著下降。然而，从1840年代开始，政治动荡和国家控制的削弱引发了先前受限类别出版的复苏。这种压制与复苏的模式也延伸到了思想层面，图书标题的关键词分析证明了这一点。进一步分析强调了寒蝉效应在驱动这些动态中的核心作用，出版商的退出和进入在知识生产的压制及随后的复兴中都扮演了关键角色。
33258.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D83, H11, N40, O31, Z18

33257.title: Conditions Under Which College Students Can be Responsive to Text-based Nudging
33257.zh_title: 大学生对基于文本的助推产生回应的条件
33257.authors: Lindsay C. Page, Katharine E. Meyer, Jeonghyun Lee, Hunter Gehlbach
33257.abstract: College success requires students to engage with their institution academically and administratively. Missteps with administrative processes can threaten student persistence and success. Through two experimental studies, one exploratory (N=13,657) and one pre-registered and confirmatory (N=11,561), we assessed the effectiveness of an artificially intelligent, text-based chatbot that proactively reached out to students to support navigation of administrative processes and use of campus resources. Across two-year and four-year college contexts, outreach was most effective when focused on discrete administrative processes–such as filing financial aid forms and managing registration holds–which were acute and time-sensitive and for which outreach could be targeted to those for whom it was relevant. We situate these experiments in the context of similar efforts targeting college students to formulate testable hypotheses about their effective use for promoting college success. Specifically, we hypothesize that proactive outreach will be most effective when: (1) framed as from a trusted source with whom students would expect to communicate; (2) targeted using data to ensure that communication is relevant to students’ personal circumstances; and (3) focused on well-defined, required, and often acute tasks.
33257.zh_abstract: 大学成功要求学生从学术和行政两方面与所在院校保持互动。行政流程中的失误可能威胁到学生的持续学习和成功。通过两项实验研究——一项探索性研究（N=13,657）和一项预注册的验证性研究（N=11,561）——我们评估了一个人工智能驱动的基于文本的聊天机器人的有效性，该机器人主动联系学生，以支持他们完成行政流程和使用校园资源。在两年制和四年制大学背景下，当外联活动聚焦于离散的行政流程（例如提交经济援助表格和管理注册冻结）时最为有效，这些流程具有紧迫性和时效性，并且外联可以针对相关学生。我们将这些实验置于针对大学生的类似努力背景下，以提出关于其有效促进大学成功的可检验假设。具体而言，我们假设主动外联在以下情况下最为有效：（1）以学生期望沟通的、可信赖的来源名义发起；（2）利用数据进行精准定位，确保沟通与学生个人情况相关；（3）聚焦于定义明确、必需且通常紧迫的任务。

33256.title: Financial Inclusion Across the United States
33256.authors: Motohiro Yogo, Andrew Whitten, Natalie Cox
33256.abstract: We study retirement and bank account participation for the universe of U.S. households with a member aged 50 to 59 in the administrative tax data. ZCTA-level average income, income inequality, and racial composition predict retirement account participation for low-income households, conditional on household income and regional price parities. Income inequality also predicts bank account participation for low-income households. We estimate the causal effect of access to an employer retirement plan on participation. Recent policy proposals for universal access with automatic enrollment could increase participation by 19 percentage points in the lowest income quintile over ten years.
33256.zh_abstract: 我们利用行政税收数据，研究了全美所有至少有一名成员年龄在50至59岁之间的家庭的退休账户和银行账户参与情况。在控制家庭收入和地区价格差异的条件下，邮政编码区层面的平均收入、收入不平等程度和种族构成能够预测低收入家庭的退休账户参与率。收入不平等程度也能预测低收入家庭的银行账户参与率。我们估算了获得雇主退休计划对参与率的因果效应。近期提出的全民自动注册政策建议，可能在十年内使最低收入五分位群体的参与率提高19个百分点。

33255.title: Political Power and Market Power
33255.authors: Bo Cowgill, Andrea Prat, Tommaso Valletti
33255.abstract: Brandeis (1914) hypothesized that firms with market power will also attempt to gain political power. To explore this hypothesis empirically, we combine data on mergers with data on lobbying expenditures and campaign contributions in the US from 1999 to 2017. We pursue two distinct empirical approaches: a panel event study and a differential exposure design. Both approaches indicate that mergers are followed by large and persistent increases in lobbying activity, both by individual firms and by industry trade associations. There is also weaker evidence for an association of mergers with campaign contributions (PACs). We also find that mergers impact the extensive margin of political activity, for example, by impacting companies’ choice to establish their first in-house lobbying teams and/or first corporate PAC. We interpret these results within an oligopoly model augmented with endogenous regulation and lobbying.
33255.zh_abstract: 布兰代斯（1914）假设，拥有市场权力的企业也会试图获取政治权力。为了实证检验这一假设，我们将1999年至2017年美国的并购数据与游说支出和竞选捐款数据相结合。我们采用了两种不同的实证方法：面板事件研究和差异化暴露设计。两种方法均表明，并购之后，无论是单个企业还是行业贸易协会的游说活动都会出现大幅且持续的增加。还有较弱的证据表明并购与竞选捐款（政治行动委员会）之间存在关联。我们还发现，并购影响了政治活动的广延边际，例如影响了企业选择建立首个内部游说团队和/或首个企业政治行动委员会的决定。我们在一个加入了内生监管和游说的寡头垄断模型框架内解释了这些结果。

33254.title: Financing, Ownership, and Performance: A Novel, Longitudinal Firm-Level Database
33254.zh_title: 融资、所有权与绩效：一个新颖的企业层面纵向数据库
33254.authors: J. David Brown, Steven J. Davis, Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, John Sabelhaus
33254.abstract: The Census Bureau’s Longitudinal Business Database (LBD) underpins many studies of firm-level behavior. It tracks longitudinally all employers in the nonfarm private sector but lacks information about business financing and owner characteristics. We address this shortcoming by linking LBD observations to firm-level data drawn from several large Census Bureau surveys. The resulting Longitudinal Employer, Owner, and Financing (LEOF) database contains more than 3 million observations at the firm-year level with information about start-up financing, current financing, owner demographics, ownership structure, profitability, and owner aspirations – all linked to annual firm-level employment data since the firm hired its first employee. Using the LEOF database, we document trends in owner demographics and financing patterns and investigate how these business characteristics relate to firm-level employment outcomes.
33254.zh_abstract: 人口普查局的纵向商业数据库（LBD）是许多企业层面行为研究的基础。它纵向追踪了非农私营部门中的所有雇主，但缺乏关于企业融资和所有者特征的信息。我们通过将LBD观测数据与来自人口普查局几项大型调查的企业层面数据相链接，解决了这一缺陷。由此产生的纵向雇主、所有者与融资（LEOF）数据库包含了超过300万个企业-年度观测值，涵盖了初创融资、当前融资、所有者人口统计特征、所有权结构、盈利能力以及所有者抱负等信息——所有这些数据都与自企业雇佣第一名员工以来的年度企业层面就业数据相关联。利用LEOF数据库，我们记录了所有者人口统计特征和融资模式的趋势，并研究了这些企业特征如何与企业层面的就业结果相关联。

33253.title: Efficient Imperfect Competition with an Application to International Trade
33253.zh_title: 有效的不完全竞争及其在国际贸易中的应用
