33253.abstract: I study the equilibrium and the welfare effects of international trade when product markets are imperfectly competitive due of search frictions—as in Burdett and Judd (1983)—rather than product differentiation—as in Dixit and Stiglitz (1977). Markups are positive, even though there are multiple firms producing identical goods. Markups depend negatively on the number of firms producing identical goods, which, in turn, determines the extent of competition in the market. Markups may be increasing, constant, decreasing or non-monotonic in firm's size, depending on the extent of competition and on the distribution of marginal costs. The entry of firms and the quantity of output produced by each firm are efficient, even though the market is imperfectly competitive. International trade increases the measure of firms in the market, intensifies competition, lowers markups, and unambiguously increases welfare. These "natural" effects of trade emerge generically in the Burdett-Judd model of imperfect competition. In the Dixit-Stiglitz model of imperfect competition, these effects are an artifact of particular specifications of preferences.
33253.zh_abstract: 我研究了当产品市场因搜索摩擦（如Burdett和Judd，1983所述）而非产品差异化（如Dixit和Stiglitz，1977所述）而处于不完全竞争状态时，国际贸易的均衡和福利效应。即使存在多家生产同质产品的企业，加成率也为正。加成率负向取决于生产同质产品的企业数量，而企业数量又决定了市场竞争程度。加成率可能随企业规模递增、不变、递减或非单调变化，这取决于竞争程度和边际成本的分布。尽管市场是不完全竞争的，但企业的进入和每家企业的产出数量是有效的。国际贸易增加了市场中的企业数量，加剧了竞争，降低了加成率，并明确地提高了福利。这些贸易的“自然”效应在Burdett-Judd的不完全竞争模型中普遍存在。而在Dixit-Stiglitz的不完全竞争模型中，这些效应只是特定偏好设定的产物。

33252.title: Sustainable Investing
33252.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
33252.abstract: We review the literature on sustainable investing, focusing on financial effects. First, we examine the effects of investor tastes on portfolio tilts and asset prices in a simple equilibrium setting. We establish novel connections, including a direct relation between the green portfolio tilt and the greenium. We also relate our framework to prior modeling of divestment. Finally, we review evidence related to the main concepts from our theoretical analysis, including the greenium, green tilts, climate risk, and investor tastes.
33252.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于可持续投资的文献，重点关注其财务效应。首先，我们在一个简单的均衡框架下考察了投资者偏好对投资组合倾斜和资产价格的影响。我们建立了新的联系，包括绿色投资组合倾斜与绿色溢价之间的直接关系。我们还将我们的框架与先前的撤资模型联系起来。最后，我们回顾了与我们理论分析中主要概念相关的证据，包括绿色溢价、绿色倾斜、气候风险和投资者偏好。

33251.title: When Democracy Refuses to Die: Evaluating a Training Program for New Politicians
33251.zh_title: 当民主拒绝消亡：评估一项针对新政治家的培训项目
33251.authors: Ernesto Dal Bó, Claudio Ferraz, Frederico Finan, Pedro Pessoa
33251.abstract: We evaluate the effects of a program in Brazil that selects and trains new politicians, addressing three main challenges: selection bias from program screening, self-selection into candidacy, and the need to quantify the contributions of both selection and training in a holistic evaluation. Our findings show that the program raised political entry by doubling candidacy rates and increasing electoral success by 69%. However, much of the overall effect was driven by screening, which accounted for 30% of the increase in candidacy and 43% of the increase in election rates, while also making the candidate pool more diverse, competent, and committed to democratic values. Renewing the political class involves trade-offs, as some traits favored by the program did not align with voter preferences, and also reduced the descriptive representation of low-income individuals.
33251.zh_abstract: 我们评估了巴西一项选拔和培训新政治家的项目效果，该项目面临三个主要挑战：项目筛选带来的选择偏差、候选人资格的自选择，以及需要在整体评估中量化选拔和培训两者的贡献。我们的研究结果表明，该项目通过使候选人率翻倍并将选举成功率提高69%，从而提升了政治参与度。然而，大部分总体效果是由筛选驱动的，筛选占候选人率增长的30%和选举率增长的43%，同时使候选人群体更加多元化、更有能力且更致力于民主价值观。更新政治阶层涉及权衡取舍，因为该项目偏好的某些特质与选民偏好不一致，并且也降低了低收入人群的描述性代表性。

33250.title: Suez
33250.authors: David S. Jacks, Christopher M. Meissner, Nikolaus Wolf
33250.abstract: For all its importance, there still is no comprehensive quantitative assessment of the Suez Canal’s opening in 1869. We find that it led to a 72% relative increase in bilateral exports for affected country pairs and a likely permanent increase in world trade. With respect to the composition of trade, Suez was associated with large changes in export shares but only for a handful of goods categories. With respect to mechanisms, the relative cost of using steamships on Suez-affected routes fell dramatically and immediately after 1869, suggesting a vital role for the canal in the global diffusion of steam technology.
33250.zh_abstract: 尽管苏伊士运河极其重要，但目前仍缺乏对其1869年开通影响的全面定量评估。我们发现，对于受影响的贸易伙伴国对，苏伊士运河的开通导致双边出口相对增长了72%，并且可能永久性地增加了世界贸易。在贸易构成方面，苏伊士运河与出口份额的巨大变化相关，但这仅发生在少数商品类别中。在机制方面，受苏伊士运河影响的航线上使用蒸汽轮船的相对成本在1869年后急剧且立即下降，这表明该运河在蒸汽技术全球扩散中发挥了至关重要的作用。

33249.title: Unhooking the Past: Early-life Exposure to Hookworm Eradication and Later-life Longevity
33249.zh_title: 摆脱过去的束缚：早期接触钩虫根除运动与晚年寿命
33249.abstract: This study examines the long-term effects of the Rockefeller Sanitary Commission’s (RSC) hookworm eradication campaign, initiated in the American South in the 1910s, on old-age longevity. Utilizing Social Security Administration death records linked to the 1940 full-count census, we employ a difference-in-differences approach to examine the effects of early-life exposure to the eradication campaign on later-life outcomes. We find that individuals exposed to the RSC campaign during in-utero and early-life experience an increase of 1.3 months in longevity. The effects are substantially larger among nonwhites, children of illiterate mothers, and those born in urban areas. Moreover, we provide evidence of dynamic complementarity in the effects of hookworm eradication on longevity, with larger effects observed in counties exposed to the Rosenwald school construction movement and in states with more stringent child labor laws. Using the 1940 census and World War II enlistment data, we provide suggestive evidence of improvements in educational attainment, income, and cognitive ability as possible pathways. Our findings contribute to the literature on the lasting effects of early-life public health interventions and underscore the importance of such programs in addressing present-day global health challenges.
33249.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了洛克菲勒卫生委员会（RSC）于1910年代在美国南部发起的钩虫根除运动对老年寿命的长期影响。利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的1940年全量人口普查数据，我们采用双重差分法来检验早期接触根除运动对晚年结果的影响。我们发现，在子宫内和幼儿时期接触RSC运动的个体，其寿命增加了1.3个月。在非白人、母亲为文盲的儿童以及城市出生的人群中，这种效应要大得多。此外，我们提供了钩虫根除对寿命影响的动态互补性证据，在接触罗森沃尔德学校建设运动的县和童工法更严格的州，观察到的效应更大。利用1940年人口普查和二战征兵数据，我们提供了教育程度、收入和认知能力改善作为可能作用途径的提示性证据。我们的研究结果为关于早期公共卫生干预持久影响的文献做出了贡献，并强调了此类项目在应对当今全球健康挑战中的重要性。
33249.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, LS；JEL：I1, I14, J10

33248.title: The Long-run Effects of Transportation Productivity on the US Economy
33248.zh_title: 交通生产率对美国经济的长期影响
33248.authors: A. Kerem Coşar, Sophie Osotimehin, Latchezar Popov
33248.abstract: We quantify the aggregate, regional and sectoral impacts of transportation productivity growth on the US economy over the period 1947-2017. Using a multi-region, multi-sector model that explicitly captures produced transportation services as a key input to interregional trade, we find that the calibrated change in transportation productivity had a sizable impact on aggregate welfare, magnified by a factor of 2.3 compared to its sectoral share in GDP. The amplification mechanism results from the complementarity between transport services and tradable goods, interacting with sectoral and spatial linkages. The geographical implications are highly uneven, with the West and Southwest benefiting the most from market access improvements while the Northeast experiences a decline. Sectoral impacts are largest in transportation-intensive activities like agriculture, mining and heavy manufacturing. Our results demonstrate the outsized and heterogeneous impact of the transportation sector in shaping US economic activity through specialization and spatial transformation.
33248.zh_abstract: 我们量化了1947-2017年间交通生产率增长对美国经济在总体、区域和部门层面的影响。通过使用一个明确将生产性交通服务作为区域间贸易关键投入的多区域、多部门模型，我们发现，校准后的交通生产率变化对总体福利产生了显著影响，其影响程度相比交通部门在GDP中的份额放大了2.3倍。这种放大机制源于交通服务与可贸易商品之间的互补性，并与部门和空间关联相互作用。地理影响极不均衡，西部和西南部从市场准入改善中获益最多，而东北部则经历了下降。部门影响在农业、采矿业和重制造业等交通密集型活动中最大。我们的结果证明了交通部门通过专业化和空间转型在塑造美国经济活动方面具有超乎寻常且异质性的影响。

33247.title: The Complementarity Between Cities and State Capacity
33247.zh_title: 城市与国家能力的互补性
33247.abstract: Public capacity complements urban density because externalities abound in cities and urban scale makes it possible to share infrastructure that needs to be managed. Yet, urban governments face limitations that are not experienced by private sector entities. A city cannot just stop policing if it decides it is bad at policing. Typically, public compensation and personnel policies are highly regulated either by law or by union contracts. City governments do, however, have one great advantage over private entities: a greater ability to learn from their peers. City governments do similar things throughout the world, while companies frequently specialize. Private companies have strong incentives to hide the trade secrets that make them more productive, cities do not. As individual cities do not have an incentive to make it easier for other governments to learn from them, multinational entities like the Asian Development Bank and the World Bank could enable that learning. Since climate-change-related crises are relatively rare events, city-to-city learning seems particularly important for adapting to climate change.
33247.zh_abstract: 公共能力与城市密度相辅相成，因为城市中外部性普遍存在，而城市规模使得共享需要管理的基础设施成为可能。然而，城市政府面临着私营部门实体所没有的限制。一个城市不能仅仅因为认为治安工作做得不好就停止治安。通常，公共薪酬和人事政策要么受法律严格监管，要么受工会合同约束。然而，城市政府相对于私营实体有一个巨大优势：更强的向同行学习的能力。世界各地的城市政府做着类似的事情，而公司则经常专业化。私营公司有强烈的动机隐藏使其更具生产力的商业机密，而城市则没有。由于单个城市没有动机让其他政府更容易向它们学习，像亚洲开发银行和世界银行这样的跨国实体可以促成这种学习。由于与气候变化相关的危机是相对罕见的事件，城市间的学习对于适应气候变化似乎尤为重要。

33246.title: War Mobilization and Economic Development: World War II and Structural Transformation in India
33246.zh_title: 战争动员与经济发展：第二次世界大战与印度的结构转型
33246.abstract: Can temporary wartime mobilization change the long-run development trajectory of an economy? We study how mobilization for World War II in colonial India influenced its subsequent development. From 1939 to 1945, the British colonial government purchased massive amounts of war materiel within India. We study long-run impacts on structural transformation—the transition of employment from agriculture to modern sectors (industry and services)—in Indian districts. Causal identification takes a shift-share approach, exploiting variation across industries in war-related government orders, and variation across districts in their pre-war industrial structure. We find that World War II economic mobilization had positive and significant impacts on long-run development. More than six decades later, districts with higher procurement of war materiel saw greater structural transformation from agriculture towards industry and services, and higher consumption levels, urbanization rates, and in-migration. We find substantial spillovers on services sectors not directly subject to procurement. The majority of structural transformation effects are driven by procurement of heavy industrial goods.
33246.zh_abstract: 暂时的战时动员能否改变一个经济体的长期发展轨迹？我们研究了为第二次世界大战进行的动员如何影响殖民地印度的后续发展。从1939年到1945年，英国殖民政府在印度境内购买了大量的战争物资。我们研究了这种动员对印度各地区结构转型——即就业从农业向现代部门（工业和服务业）转移——的长期影响。因果识别采用了一个转移份额方法，利用不同行业在政府战争订单中的差异，以及各地区在战前产业结构上的差异。我们发现，第二次世界大战的经济动员对长期发展产生了积极且显著的影响。六十多年后，战争物资采购量更高的地区，经历了从农业向工业和服务业更大的结构转型，并且消费水平、城市化率和迁入人口也更高。我们发现，对未直接受到采购影响的服务业部门也存在显著的溢出效应。结构转型效应的大部分是由重工业产品的采购驱动的。
33246.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H56, N15, N45, O14, O25

33245.title: Conflict in Dismissals
33245.abstract: How do the employer and the worker interact during a dismissal? This paper tests whether they cooperate to minimize costs, or instead engage in conflict—i.e., deliberately amplify costs. We leverage a unique feature of the French labor market: an employer and a worker can jointly opt to replace a costly dismissal by a cheaper and more flexible “separation by mutual agreement” (SMA). Introduced in 2008, SMAs eliminate red tape costs, enable severance pay bargaining, and preclude litigation. However, we find that only 12% of dismissals are resolved through SMAs—far below the efficient level predicted by standard bargaining models. Surveying HR directors, we identify three drivers of conflict that hinder cost minimization: (i) hostility between the employer and the employee, (ii) employers using dismissals as a “discipline device” to maintain incentives, and (iii) asymmetric beliefs about subsequent labor court outcomes. Using counterfactual scenarios in the survey, we find that removing these three drivers of conflict would increase SMA adoption from 12% to 67% of dismissals. We confirm that less conflictual dismissals—due to either better employer-employee relationships or workers benefiting from early retirement—end more often as SMAs.
33245.zh_abstract: 在解雇过程中，雇主和工人是如何互动的？本文检验他们是合作以最小化成本，还是陷入冲突——即故意放大成本。我们利用了法国劳动力市场的一个独特特征：雇主和工人可以共同选择用更便宜、更灵活的“双方协议解除劳动合同”（SMA）来替代成本高昂的解雇。SMA于2008年引入，消除了繁琐的行政成本，允许协商遣散费，并排除了诉讼。然而，我们发现只有12%的解雇是通过SMA解决的——远低于标准讨价还价模型预测的有效水平。通过调查人力资源总监，我们识别出阻碍成本最小化的三个冲突驱动因素：(i) 雇主与雇员之间的敌意，(ii) 雇主将解雇作为维持激励的“纪律工具”，以及 (iii) 关于后续劳动法庭结果的不对称信念。通过调查中的反事实情景，我们发现消除这三个冲突驱动因素将使SMA在解雇中的采用率从12%提高到67%。我们证实，冲突较少的解雇——无论是由于更好的劳资关系还是工人受益于提前退休——更常以SMA告终。
33245.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, LS, ME, PE；JEL：D9, E24, J0, J38, J50, J63, M5

33244.title: The Effect of Medicaid on Crime: Evidence from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
33244.zh_title: 医疗补助对犯罪的影响：来自俄勒冈健康保险实验的证据
33244.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Sarah Miller, Katherine Baicker
33244.abstract: Those involved with the criminal justice system have disproportionately high rates of mental illness and substance-use disorders, prompting speculation that health insurance, by improving treatment of these conditions, could reduce crime. Using the 2008 Oregon Health Insurance Experiment, which randomly made some low-income adults eligible to apply for Medicaid, we find no statistically significant impact of Medicaid coverage on criminal charges or convictions. These null effects persist for high-risk subgroups, such as those with prior criminal cases and convictions or mental health conditions. In the full sample, our confidence intervals can rule out most quasi-experimental estimates of Medicaid’s crime-reducing impact.
33244.zh_abstract: 涉及刑事司法系统的人患有精神疾病和物质使用障碍的比例异常高，这引发了一种推测，即健康保险通过改善对这些疾病的治疗，可以减少犯罪。利用2008年俄勒冈健康保险实验（该实验随机使一些低收入成年人有资格申请医疗补助），我们发现医疗补助覆盖对刑事指控或定罪没有统计上显著的影响。这些零效应在高风险亚组（例如，有先前刑事案件和定罪或心理健康状况的人）中仍然存在。在完整样本中，我们的置信区间可以排除大多数关于医疗补助减少犯罪影响的准实验估计。

33243.title: Granular Treasury Demand with Arbitrageurs
33243.zh_title: 具有套利者的颗粒状国债需求
33243.authors: Kristy A.E. Jansen, Wenhao Li, Lukas Schmid
33243.abstract: We construct a novel dataset of sector-level U.S. Treasury holdings, covering the majority of the market. Using this dataset, we estimate maturity-specific demand functions and elasticities of different investors and the Fed, and integrate them into a dynamic equilibrium model of the Treasury market with risk-averse arbitrageurs. Quantifying the model reveals that (1) there is a steep downward-sloping term structure of Treasury market elasticity; (2) monetary tightening raises term premia due to arbitrageurs interacting with investors exhibiting high cross-elasticities; (3) QE has limited impact unless the Fed credibly commits to sustained balance sheet expansion.
33243.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个涵盖市场大部分份额的、按部门划分的美国国债持有量的新颖数据集。利用该数据集，我们估计了不同投资者和美联储的期限特定需求函数和弹性，并将其整合到一个包含风险厌恶套利者的国债市场动态均衡模型中。对该模型的量化揭示：(1) 国债市场弹性存在陡峭的向下倾斜的期限结构；(2) 由于套利者与表现出高交叉弹性的投资者相互作用，货币紧缩会提高期限溢价；(3) 除非美联储可信地承诺持续扩张资产负债表，否则量化宽松的影响有限。

33242.title: When Given Discretion Teachers Did Not Shirk: Evidence from Remedial Education in Secondary Schools
33242.zh_title: 当被赋予自由裁量权时，教师并未偷懒：来自中学补习教育的证据
33242.authors: Sabrin A. Beg, Anne E. Fitzpatrick, Jason T. Kerwin, Adrienne Lucas, Khandker Wahedur Rahman
33242.abstract: Public-sector organizations face a tradeoff: allowing workers discretion at the point of service to adapt to local needs, versus rigid harmonization to ensure uniform service delivery. We examine this tradeoff in the context of secondary schools in Odisha, India, where the centrally set curriculum is nearly 4 grades above the learning levels of the mean student. We conduct a randomized intervention that assigned schools to either a rigid or a flexible version of a remedial learning intervention that displaced the curriculum. We compare learning outcomes and teaching quality to the status quo. Both interventions increased learning by 0.11SD, about 60 percent of a year of learning, with gains throughout the learning distribution. We find no crowd-out of grade-level mastery, and no change in the likelihood of earning passing Board Marks one year later. Discretion did not lower the quality of implementation or induce shirking. Allowing teachers flexibility to adjust classroom content to student needs was beneficial and had limited downsides.
33242.zh_abstract: 公共部门组织面临一个权衡：允许一线工作者根据当地需求灵活调整服务，与为了确保统一服务交付而进行僵化的协调统一。我们在印度奥里萨邦的中学背景下考察了这一权衡，这些学校中央设定的课程比普通学生的学习水平高出近4个年级。我们进行了一项随机干预，将学校分配到一种替代课程的补习干预的僵化版本或灵活版本。我们将学习成果和教学质量与现状进行比较。两种干预措施都将学习效果提高了0.11个标准差，约为一年学习成果的60%，且在整个学习分布中都有所收获。我们没有发现对年级水平掌握的挤出效应，也没有发现一年后通过董事会考试的可能性发生变化。自由裁量权并未降低实施质量或引发偷懒行为。允许教师灵活调整课堂内容以适应学生需求是有益的，且负面影响有限。
33242.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H40, I25, I28, J24, M54, O15

33241.title: LASH risk and Interest Rates
33241.authors: Laura Alfaro, Saleem A. Bahaj, Robert Czech, Jonathon Hazell, Ioana Neamtu
33241.abstract: This paper studies a form of liquidity risk that we call ‘Liquidity After Solvency Hedging’ or “LASH” risk. Financial institutions take LASH risk when they hedge against solvency risk, using strategies that require liquidity when the solvency of the institution improves. We focus on LASH risk relating to interest rate movements. Our framework implies that institutions with longer-duration liabilities than assets—e.g. pension funds and insurers—take more LASH risk as interest rates fall. Using UK regulatory data from 2019-22 on the universe of sterling repo and swap transactions, we measure, in real time and at the institution level, LASH risk for the non-bank sector. We find that at the peak level of LASH risk, a 100bps increase in interest rates would have led to liquidity needs close to the cash holdings of the pension fund and insurance sector. Using a cross-sectional identification strategy, we find that low interest rates caused increases in LASH risk. We then find that the pre-crisis LASH risk of non-banks predicts their bond sales during the 2022 UK bond market crisis, contributing to the yield spike in the market.
33241.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一种我们称之为“偿付能力对冲后的流动性”风险或“LASH”风险的流动性风险形式。金融机构在采用需要在其偿付能力改善时提供流动性的策略来对冲偿付能力风险时，会承担LASH风险。我们关注与利率变动相关的LASH风险。我们的框架意味着，负债久期长于资产的机构——例如养老基金和保险公司——在利率下降时会承担更多的LASH风险。利用2019-22年英国关于所有英镑回购和掉期交易的监管数据，我们实时、在机构层面衡量了非银行部门的LASH风险。我们发现，在LASH风险的峰值水平上，利率上升100个基点将导致养老基金和保险部门的流动性需求接近其现金持有量。通过使用横截面识别策略，我们发现低利率导致了LASH风险的增加。然后我们发现，非银行部门在危机前的LASH风险预测了它们在2022年英国债券市场危机期间的债券抛售，从而加剧了市场的收益率飙升。
33241.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F30, G10, G22, G23

33240.title: Beyond Bruen: Can Firearm Training Replace Local Discretion in Concealed Carry Permitting?
33240.zh_title: 超越布鲁恩案：枪支培训能否取代地方在隐蔽持枪许可中的自由裁量权？
33240.authors: John J. Donohue, Matthew Benavides, Amy L. Zhang, Alex Oktay
33240.abstract: The 2022 Supreme Court case NYSRPA v. Bruen struck down states’ discretion in issuing individuals firearm right-to-carry permits. As the country transitions towards more and more permissive concealed carry regulation, it has remained unclear how permitting processes and requirements affect personal and public safety. Leveraging a novel dataset of state laws spanning 2000- 2022, we find that more stringent concealed carry requirements, such as higher fees or more training hours, do not deter gun owners from obtaining carrying licenses, nor do they alter their behavior substantially enough to impact public safety outcomes including violent crimes, gun theft, or accidental shootings. As such, stricter training requirements are unable to counteract the effects of more permissive concealed carry issuance.
33240.zh_abstract: 2022年最高法院审理的NYSRPA诉布鲁恩案推翻了各州在发放个人枪支携带许可证方面的自由裁量权。随着国家向越来越宽松的隐蔽持枪监管过渡，许可程序和要求如何影响个人和公共安全仍不清楚。利用2000年至2022年间各州法律的新数据集，我们发现更严格的隐蔽持枪要求，例如更高的费用或更多的培训时长，并不会阻止枪支拥有者获得携带许可证，也不会显著改变他们的行为以影响公共安全结果，包括暴力犯罪、枪支盗窃或意外枪击事件。因此，更严格的培训要求无法抵消更宽松的隐蔽持枪发放所带来的影响。

33239.title: Toward an Understanding of the Political Economy of Using Field Experiments in Policymaking
33239.zh_title: 理解在政策制定中使用实地实验的政治经济学
33239.abstract: Field experiments provide the clearest window into the true impact of many policies, allowing us to understand what works, what does not, and why. Yet, their widespread use has not been accompanied by a deep understanding of the political economy of their adoption in policy circles. This study begins with a large-scale natural field experiment that demonstrates the ineffectiveness of a widely implemented intervention. We leverage this result to understand how policymakers and a representative sample of the U.S. population update their beliefs of not only the policy itself, but the use of science and the trust they have in government. Policymakers, initially overly optimistic about the program’s effectiveness, adjust their views based on evidence but show reduced demand for experimentation, suggesting experiment aversion when results defy expectations. Among the U.S. public, support for policy experiments is high and remains robust despite receiving disappointing results, though trust in the implementing institutions declines, particularly in terms of perceptions of competence and integrity. Providing additional information on the value of learning from unexpected findings partially mitigates this trust loss. These insights, from both the demand and supply side, reveal the complexities of managing policymakers’ expectations and underscore the potential returns to educating the public on the value of open-mindedness in policy experimentation.
33239.zh_abstract: 实地实验为许多政策的真实影响提供了最清晰的窗口，使我们能够理解哪些政策有效、哪些无效以及原因。然而，它们的广泛使用并未伴随着对其在政策圈中采纳的政治经济学的深入理解。本研究从一个大规模的自然实地实验开始，该实验证明了一项广泛实施的干预措施无效。我们利用这一结果来理解政策制定者和美国人口的代表性样本如何更新他们对政策本身、科学使用以及对政府信任的信念。政策制定者最初对该项目的有效性过于乐观，他们会根据证据调整观点，但对实验的需求却减少了，这表明当结果违背预期时存在实验厌恶。在美国公众中，对政策实验的支持度很高，并且在收到令人失望的结果后仍然保持强劲，尽管对实施机构的信任度有所下降，特别是在能力和诚信认知方面。提供关于从意外发现中学习价值的额外信息，部分缓解了这种信任损失。这些来自需求侧和供给侧的见解揭示了管理政策制定者期望的复杂性，并强调了教育公众在政策实验中保持开放心态价值的潜在回报。
33239.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：C9, C93, H4, H41, O12, O36, P1

33299.title: Highway Procurement During the Great Recession and Stimulus
33299.zh_title: 大衰退与刺激计划期间的公路采购
33299.authors: Dakshina G. De Silva, Benjamin Rosa
33299.abstract: We study highway procurement in Texas during the Great Recession and stimulus period, finding increased competition with more bidders and lower bids. We argue that the recession reduced opportunity costs, in part due to a slump in private-sector construction. We evaluate costs and efficiency by developing methods to estimate an empirical auction model tailored for public bidding and demonstrate that contracts became more efficient and less costly. A counterfactual analysis confirms that infrastructure procurement during recessions not only stimulates the economy but also enables the government to complete necessary projects at lower costs.
33299.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大衰退和刺激计划期间德克萨斯州的公路采购，发现竞争加剧，投标人增多且报价降低。我们认为，经济衰退降低了机会成本，部分原因是私营部门建筑业的低迷。我们通过开发一种针对公共招标量身定制的实证拍卖模型估计方法来评估成本和效率，并证明合同变得更高效且成本更低。反事实分析证实，经济衰退期间的基础设施采购不仅能刺激经济，还能使政府以更低成本完成必要项目。

33298.title: Risk Loving and Fat Tails in the Wealth Distribution
33298.zh_title: 风险偏好与财富分布中的厚尾现象
33298.authors: Aloisio Araujo, Juan Pablo Gama, Timothy J. Kehoe
33298.abstract: We study the dynamic properties of the wealth distribution in an overlapping generations model with warm-glow bequests and heterogeneous attitudes towards risk. Some dynasties of agents are risk averters, and others are risk lovers. Agents can invest in two types of Lucas trees. The two types of trees are symmetric in the sense that one type has a high return in states where the other has a return of zero. This symmetry allows risk averters to perfectly ensure their future income and eliminates aggregate uncertainty in the model. Furthermore, risk lovers take extreme portfolio positions, which make it easy for us to characterize the evolution of their wealth holdings over time. We show that the model has an equilibrium in which the aggregate wealth distribution converges to a unique invariant distribution. The invariant distribution of wealth of the risk lovers has fat tails for high bequest rates. The existence of fat tails is endogenously generated by the behavior of risk lovers rather than by the exogenous existence of fat tails in the endowments or in the returns of the assets.
33298.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有温暖遗赠动机和异质性风险态度的世代交叠模型中财富分布的动态特性。一些王朝的代理人是风险规避者，而另一些则是风险偏好者。代理人可以投资于两种类型的卢卡斯树。这两种树是对称的，因为一种树在另一种树收益为零的状态下具有高回报。这种对称性使得风险规避者能够完美地确保其未来收入，并消除了模型中的总体不确定性。此外，风险偏好者采取极端的投资组合头寸，这使得我们能够轻松描述其财富持有量随时间的变化。我们证明，该模型存在一个均衡，其中总财富分布收敛于一个唯一的平稳分布。风险偏好者的财富平稳分布在遗赠率较高时具有厚尾特征。厚尾的存在是由风险偏好者的行为内生生成的，而非源于禀赋或资产回报中外生存在的厚尾。

33297.title: From Competitors to Partners: Banks’ Venture Investments in Fintech
33297.zh_title: 从竞争对手到合作伙伴：银行对金融科技的风险投资
33297.authors: Manju Puri, Yiming Qian, Xiang Zheng
33297.abstract: We hypothesize and find evidence that banks use venture investments in fintech startups as a strategic approach to navigate fintech competition. We show that banks’ venture investments have increasingly focused on fintech firms in systematic ways. We find that banks facing greater fintech competition are more likely to make venture investments in fintech startups. Banks target fintech firms that exhibit higher levels of asset complementarities with their own business. Finally, instrumental variable analyses show that venture investments increase the likelihood of operational collaborations and knowledge transfer between the bank investor and the fintech investee.
33297.zh_abstract: 我们假设并发现证据表明，银行将风险投资于金融科技初创企业作为应对金融科技竞争的战略方法。我们显示，银行的风险投资已日益系统性地聚焦于金融科技公司。我们发现，面临更大金融科技竞争的银行更有可能对金融科技初创企业进行风险投资。银行瞄准那些与其自身业务具有更高资产互补性的金融科技公司。最后，工具变量分析表明，风险投资增加了银行投资者与金融科技被投资方之间运营合作和知识转移的可能性。

33296.title: Instrumental Variables with Time-Varying Exposure: New Estimates of Revascularization Effects on Quality of Life
33296.zh_title: 具有时变暴露的工具变量：血运重建对生活质量影响的新估计
33296.authors: Joshua Angrist, Bruno Ferman, Carol Gao, Peter Hull, Otavio L. Tecchio, Robert W. Yeh
33296.abstract: The ISCHEMIA Trial randomly assigned patients with ischemic heart disease to an invasive treatment strategy centered on revascularization with a control group assigned non-invasive medical therapy. As is common in such “strategy trials,” many participants assigned to treatment remained untreated while many assigned to control crossed over into treatment. Intention-to-treat (ITT) analyses of strategy trials preserve randomization-based comparisons, but ITT effects are diluted by non-compliance. Conventional per-protocol analyses that condition on treatment received are likely biased by discarding random assignment. In trials where compliance choices are made shortly after assignment, instrumental variables (IV) methods solve both problems—recovering an undiluted average causal effect of treatment for treated subjects who comply with trial protocol. In ISCHEMIA, however, some controls were revascularized as long as five years after random assignment. This paper extends the IV framework for strategy trials, allowing for such dynamic non-random compliance behavior. IV estimates of long-run revascularization effects on quality of life are markedly larger than previously reported ITT and per-protocol estimates. We also show how to estimate complier characteristics in a dynamic-treatment setting. These estimates reveal increasing selection bias in naive time-varying per-protocol estimates of revascularization effects. Compliers have baseline health similar to that of the study population, while control-group crossovers are far sicker.
33296.zh_abstract: ISCHEMIA试验将缺血性心脏病患者随机分配至以血运重建为中心的侵入性治疗策略组，对照组则接受非侵入性药物治疗。正如这类“策略试验”中常见的情况，许多被分配至治疗组的参与者未接受治疗，而许多被分配至对照组的参与者则交叉接受了治疗。策略试验的意向治疗分析保留了基于随机化的比较，但意向治疗效果因不依从而被稀释。基于实际接受治疗进行分组的传统符合方案分析很可能因丢弃随机分配而产生偏倚。在依从选择在分配后不久做出的试验中，工具变量方法解决了这两个问题——为遵守试验方案的治疗对象恢复了未被稀释的平均因果效应。然而，在ISCHEMIA试验中，一些对照组参与者在随机分配后长达五年才接受血运重建。本文扩展了策略试验的工具变量框架，允许这种动态的非随机依从行为。血运重建对生活质量的长期效应的工具变量估计值显著大于先前报告的意向治疗和符合方案估计值。我们还展示了如何在动态治疗环境中估计依从者特征。这些估计揭示了血运重建效应的朴素时变符合方案估计中日益增大的选择偏倚。依从者的基线健康状况与研究人群相似，而对照组的交叉者则病情严重得多。

33295.title: Between Government and Market: The Political Economics of Labor Unions
33295.zh_title: 在政府与市场之间：工会的政治经济学
33295.abstract: We survey and summarize recent literature on labor unions in political economy. While labor unions have been a long-standing subject of study in labor and macroeconomics, until recently they have been less studied by political economists, despite being important political actors in many policy-relevant contexts. We first organize the literature into work on the external influence of unions on the political system, including effects on voting, campaign finance, lobbying, and intraparty bargaining. We then discuss work on the internal politics and organization of unions, including issues of selection and representation, union aggregation of preferences. We pay special attention to the economic and political effects of public sector unions. We also discuss union behavior in weakly institutionalized contexts, where crime, corruption, rent-seeking, political strikes, and violence are all issues. We conclude with directions for future work.
33295.zh_abstract: 我们调查并总结了近期关于政治经济学中工会的文献。尽管工会长期以来一直是劳动经济学和宏观经济学的研究对象，但直到最近，政治经济学家对它们的研究较少，尽管工会在许多政策相关背景下是重要的政治行动者。我们首先将文献组织为关于工会对政治体系外部影响的研究，包括对投票、竞选资金、游说和党内谈判的影响。然后，我们讨论关于工会内部政治和组织的研究，包括选择和代表性问题、工会对偏好的聚合。我们特别关注公共部门工会的经济和政治效应。我们还讨论了在制度薄弱环境中的工会行为，其中犯罪、腐败、寻租、政治罢工和暴力都是问题。最后，我们指出了未来研究的方向。

33293.title: Geopolitics and the World Trading System
33293.zh_title: 地缘政治与世界贸易体系
33293.authors: Aaditya Mattoo, Michele Ruta, Robert W. Staiger
33293.abstract: Until the beginning of this century, the GATT/WTO system worked. Economic research provided a compelling explanation. It showed that if governments maximize the well-being of their own countries broadly defined, GATT/WTO principles would facilitate mutually beneficial cooperation over their trade policy choices. Now heightened geopolitical rivalry seems to have undermined the WTO. A simple transposition of the previous rationalization suggests that geopolitics and trade cooperation are not compatible. We show that this is only true if rivalry eclipses any consideration of own-country well-being. In all other circumstances, there are gains from trade cooperation even with geopolitics. Furthermore, the WTO’s relevance is in question only if it adheres too rigidly to its existing rules and norms. Through measured adaptation to the geopolitical imperative, the WTO can continue to thrive as a forum for multilateral trade cooperation in the age of geopolitics.
33293.zh_abstract: 直到本世纪初，关贸总协定/世贸组织体系一直有效运作。经济研究提供了一个令人信服的解释。它表明，如果政府以广义的本国福祉最大化为目标，关贸总协定/世贸组织的原则将促进其贸易政策选择上的互利合作。如今，加剧的地缘政治竞争似乎削弱了世贸组织。简单套用先前的理论表明，地缘政治与贸易合作是不相容的。我们证明，只有当竞争完全压倒了对本国福祉的任何考虑时，情况才如此。在所有其他情况下，即使存在地缘政治，贸易合作也能带来收益。此外，只有当世贸组织过于僵化地固守其现有规则和规范时，其相关性才会受到质疑。通过适度适应地缘政治需要，世贸组织可以继续作为地缘政治时代多边贸易合作的论坛而蓬勃发展。
33293.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F11, F13, F5, F51, F53, F55

33292.title: Phoning Home: The Procurement of Telecommunications for Incarcerated Individuals in the United States
33292.zh_title: 打电话回家：美国被监禁者电信服务的采购
33292.authors: Marleen R. Marra, Nathan H. Miller, Gretchen Sileo
33292.abstract: Incarcerated individuals in the U.S. purchase goods and services from monopoly vendors selected by their correctional authority. We study telecommunications, which have come under bipartisan scrutiny due to the high prices inmates pay for phone calls. Prospective providers are evaluated on their technical capabilities, the prices they would charge, and the “commission” they would pay the correctional authority. Using data from public records requests, we estimate a first-score auction model with evaluation uncertainty and multi-dimensional bidder heterogeneity. The model indicates that reducing the role of commissions in procurement lowers prices, whereas increasing competition among providers mainly raises commissions. Moreover, recent federal regulations that ban commissions and cap prices likely preserve providers' profitability.
33292.zh_abstract: 美国的被监禁者从其惩教机构选定的垄断供应商处购买商品和服务。我们研究电信服务，由于囚犯为电话通话支付高昂价格，这一问题已受到两党关注。潜在供应商根据其技术能力、拟收取的价格以及向惩教机构支付的“佣金”进行评估。利用公共记录请求的数据，我们估计了一个具有评估不确定性和多维投标人异质性的第一得分拍卖模型。该模型表明，减少佣金在采购中的作用会降低价格，而增加供应商之间的竞争主要会提高佣金。此外，最近禁止佣金并设定价格上限的联邦法规可能仍能维持供应商的盈利能力。
33292.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, D44, H57, L13, L51, L96

33291.title: Long Run Cost Benefit Rules
33291.abstract: I study a preference relation on risky long run public projects induced by a large maturity limit of expected present values. Under common assumptions this relation has a variational representation that is related to a well known model of ambiguity aversion; it is non-probabilistic in general. The formalism generalizes Weitzman’s ‘lowest possible rate’ formula for long run discount rates to a large class of stochastic economies, gives rise to a notion of stochastic dominance adapted to long run valuation, and characterizes features of stochastic processes that cause long run cost benefit rules to be non-probabilistic.
33291.zh_abstract: 我研究了一种由预期现值的长期极限所引致的、关于风险性长期公共项目的偏好关系。在常见假设下，这种关系具有一个变分表示，该表示与一个著名的模糊厌恶模型相关；它通常是非概率性的。该形式将韦茨曼关于长期贴现率的“最低可能利率”公式推广到一大类随机经济体，提出了一个适用于长期估值的随机占优概念，并刻画了导致长期成本收益规则为非概率性的随机过程的特征。

33290.title: On the Definition and Estimation of Economic Resilience using Counterfactuals
33290.zh_title: 基于反事实的经济韧性定义与估计
33290.abstract: A household is economically resilient if it manages a shock with minimal reduction in current and future well-being. This paper develops the first measure of resilience consistent with this simple, but compelling definition. Using simulated data, we implement the measure and show it can be used to judge the efficacy of resilience-promoting interventions. Simulated data allows us to explore the measure under a variety of scenarios, interventions and data generation processes. We also show how the measure performs in the with and without poverty traps and show that when data are limited, income is a more reliable measure of economic well-being for measuring resilience than is consumption. We also implement the measure using real data from a recent RCT on an intervention intended to promote resilience and show that the financial returns to promoting resilience are high and can save public resources compared to a reactive social protection policy.
33290.zh_abstract: 如果一个家庭在应对冲击时能将当前和未来福祉的减少降至最低，则该家庭具有经济韧性。本文开发了第一个符合这一简单但令人信服定义的韧性度量。利用模拟数据，我们实施该度量并展示其可用于判断促进韧性干预措施的有效性。模拟数据使我们能够在各种情景、干预措施和数据生成过程下探索该度量。我们还展示了该度量在存在和不存在贫困陷阱情况下的表现，并表明当数据有限时，收入比消费更适合作为衡量韧性的经济福祉指标。我们还利用来自一项旨在促进韧性的近期随机对照试验的真实数据实施该度量，并表明促进韧性的财务回报很高，并且与反应性社会保护政策相比可以节省公共资源。

33289.title: Climbing the Ivory Tower: How Socio-Economic Background Shapes Academia
33289.zh_title: 攀登象牙塔：社会经济背景如何塑造学术界
33289.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Lena Greska, Santiago Pérez, Joseph Price, Carlo Schwarz, Fabian Waldinger
33289.abstract: We explore how socio-economic background shapes academia, collecting the largest dataset of U.S. academics’ backgrounds and research output. Individuals from poorer backgrounds have been severely underrepresented for seven decades, especially in humanities and elite universities. Father’s occupation predicts professors’ discipline choice and, thus, the direction of research. While we find no differences in the average number of publications, academics from poorer backgrounds are both more likely to not publish and to have outstanding publication records. Academics from poorer backgrounds introduce more novel scientific concepts, but are less likely to receive recognition, as measured by citations, Nobel Prize nominations, and awards.
33289.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了社会经济背景如何塑造学术界，收集了关于美国学者背景和研究成果的最大数据集。来自贫困背景的个人在七十年间一直严重代表性不足，尤其是在人文学科和精英大学。父亲的职业预测了教授的专业选择，从而预测了研究方向。虽然我们在平均发表数量上没有发现差异，但来自贫困背景的学者既更可能不发表论文，也更可能拥有杰出的发表记录。来自贫困背景的学者引入了更多新颖的科学概念，但获得认可的可能性较低，这通过引用次数、诺贝尔奖提名和奖项来衡量。

33288.title: Unified Growth Theory: Roots of Growth and Inequality in the Wealth of Nations
33288.zh_title: 统一增长理论：国家财富中增长与不平等的根源
33288.abstract: What sparked humanity’s leap from stagnation to prosperity? What lies at the core of inequality among nations? Unified Growth Theory explores the evolution of societies over the entire course of human history. It uncovers the universal wheels of change that have governed the journey of humanity, driven the growth process, and shaped inequality across the globe. The theory sheds light on two of the most fundamental mysteries surrounding this journey: (i) The Mystery of Growth—the origins of the dramatic transformation in human prosperity over the past two centuries, in the wake of millennia of near stagnation; and (ii) The Mystery of Inequality—the roots of the vast inequality in the wealth of nations. The theory suggests that forces operating in the distant past are central to the understanding of the uneven development across the globe and the design of effective policies that could promote economic growth and mitigate inequality.
33288.zh_abstract: 是什么激发了人类从停滞到繁荣的飞跃？国家间不平等的核心是什么？统一增长理论探索了人类社会在整个历史进程中的演变。它揭示了支配人类旅程、驱动增长过程并塑造全球不平等的普遍变革动力。该理论阐明了围绕这一旅程的两个最基本谜团：（i）增长之谜——在数千年的近乎停滞之后，过去两个世纪人类繁荣发生戏剧性转变的起源；以及（ii）不平等之谜——国家财富巨大不平等的根源。该理论表明，在遥远过去运作的力量对于理解全球发展不平衡以及设计能够促进经济增长和缓解不平等的有效政策至关重要。
33288.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：I25, J10, O10, O40, Z10

33287.title: Spatial Linkages and the Uneven Effects of a Commodity Boom
33287.zh_title: 空间关联与大宗商品繁荣的不均衡影响
33287.authors: Felipe Benguria, Felipe Saffie, Shihangyin Zhang
33287.abstract: We study the uneven effects of a commodity cycle, documenting its impact across workers based on their skill and the region where they live. To this end, we develop a dynamic quantitative model of a multi-region economy featuring spatial linkages (interregional trade and migration) and downward wage rigidity. Empirically, we focus on the experience of Brazil during the commodity boom of the 2000s and subsequent bust of the 2010s. The commodity cycle causes an important decline in the skill premium during the boom, while the extent of downward wage rigidity determines whether it reverts or maintains its decline during the bust. In addition, there is substantial heterogeneity across Brazilian states in the gains from the commodity cycle. Finally, we build counterfactuals to show that both spatial linkages (interregional migration and interregional trade) and downward wage rigidity jointly shape the impact of the commodity cycle on the skill premium, real wages, unemployment, and spatial disparities.
33287.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个大宗商品周期的不均衡影响，记录了其基于工人技能和居住地区对工人的影响。为此，我们开发了一个包含空间关联（区域间贸易和移民）和向下工资刚性的多区域经济动态定量模型。实证上，我们聚焦于巴西在2000年代大宗商品繁荣及随后2010年代萧条期间的经历。大宗商品周期在繁荣期间导致技能溢价显著下降，而向下工资刚性的程度决定了技能溢价在萧条期间是恢复还是维持其下降。此外，巴西各州在大宗商品周期中的收益存在显著异质性。最后，我们构建反事实分析表明，空间关联（区域间移民和区域间贸易）和向下工资刚性共同塑造了大宗商品周期对技能溢价、实际工资、失业和空间差异的影响。

33286.title: From Flat to Fair? The Effects of a Progressive Tax Reform
33286.zh_title: 从单一税率到公平？累进税制改革的影响
33286.authors: Nicolas Ajzenman, Guillermo Cruces, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Darío Tortarolo, Gonzalo Vazquez-Bare
33286.abstract: We study the effects of a progressive tax reform on tax compliance, using a research design that distinguishes between two channels. First, using a quasi-experimental design, we estimate the direct effects of the reform—namely, how changes in a household’s own tax rate affect its own compliance. Second, leveraging a large-scale natural field experiment, we estimate the indirect effects: holding a household’s own tax rate constant, we examine how its compliance is influenced by changes in the tax rates of other, poorer or richer, households. We find substantial direct effects: lowering taxes for poor households increases their compliance, while raising taxes for rich households reduces theirs. We also find sizable indirect effects: when poor households learn about the tax hikes on the rich, their stated perceptions of tax fairness and their actual compliance both increase. Among rich households, learning about tax cuts for the poor also improves perceived fairness, but, if anything, reduces compliance. Using an additional reform and follow-up field experiment conducted a year later, we replicate both the quasi-experimental and experimental results. Together, our findings show that tax compliance responds not only to a household’s own tax burden but also to its perception of fairness of the broader tax system. Our results also underscore the potential disconnect between stated and revealed preferences for redistribution. Finally, we present a counterfactual analysis that illustrates the implications of the direct and indirect effects for designing progressive tax reforms.
33286.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种区分两种渠道的研究设计，研究了累进税制改革对税收遵从的影响。首先，利用准实验设计，我们估计了改革的直接效应——即家庭自身税率变化如何影响其自身的税收遵从。其次，利用大规模自然实地实验，我们估计了间接效应：在保持家庭自身税率不变的情况下，我们考察其税收遵从如何受到其他更穷或更富家庭税率变化的影响。我们发现显著的直接效应：降低贫困家庭的税率提高了其税收遵从，而提高富裕家庭的税率则降低了其税收遵从。我们还发现了显著的间接效应：当贫困家庭了解到对富裕家庭的增税时，他们对税收公平的陈述性认知和实际税收遵从都增加了。在富裕家庭中，了解到对贫困家庭的减税也改善了感知公平，但反而降低了税收遵从。利用一年后进行的额外改革和后续实地实验，我们复制了准实验和实验结果。总之，我们的发现表明，税收遵从不仅对家庭自身的税负做出反应，也对其对整个税收体系公平性的感知做出反应。我们的结果还强调了关于再分配的陈述性偏好与揭示性偏好之间可能存在的脱节。最后，我们提出了一个反事实分析，说明了直接和间接效应对设计累进税制改革的意义。
33286.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, D31, H24, H26, H71

33285.title: Diffusion in Social Networks: Experimental Evidence on Information Sharing vs Persuasion
33285.zh_title: 社交网络中的扩散：关于信息分享与说服的实验证据
33285.authors: Marcel Fafchamps, Asadul Islam, Debayan Pakrashi, Denni Tommasi
33285.abstract: We conduct a clustered randomized controlled trial across 180 villages in Uttar Pradesh, India, to promote the take-up of a savings commitment product newly introduced to our study population. A random subset of participants was targeted through our promotional campaign to test whether the product's diffusion among untargeted participants operates primarily through information sharing or through persuasion by incentivized target participants. If social learning is the main channel of diffusion, we would expect higher sign-up and take-up rates in information villages compared to persuasion villages. Conversely, if persuasion is the primary channel, sign-up and take-up rates should be higher in persuasion villages. Our findings consistently favor the persuasion channel, as sign-up and take-up rates were higher in the persuasion treatment, even without increased financial literacy or knowledge about the product. Information alone had a negligible impact on take-up, while the combined treatment achieved the highest sign-up and conversion rates, suggesting that information complements persuasion by enhancing its effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of incentivized persuasion in promoting product take-up and suggest that, in certain contexts, direct information-sharing may be less effective than previously assumed.
33285.zh_abstract: 我们在印度北方邦的180个村庄进行了一项整群随机对照试验，以推广一项新引入我们研究人群的储蓄承诺产品的采用。通过我们的推广活动，随机选择了一部分参与者作为目标，以测试该产品在非目标参与者中的扩散主要是通过信息分享还是通过受激励目标参与者的说服来运作。如果社会学习是扩散的主要渠道，我们预期信息村的注册率和采用率会高于说服村。相反，如果说服是主要渠道，说服村的注册率和采用率应该更高。我们的发现一致支持说服渠道，因为说服处理组的注册率和采用率更高，即使没有提高金融素养或对产品的了解。仅凭信息对采用的影响微乎其微，而联合处理实现了最高的注册率和转化率，这表明信息通过增强说服的有效性来补充说服。这些结果强调了受激励的说服在促进产品采用中的重要性，并表明在某些情境下，直接信息分享可能不如先前假设的那样有效。

33284.title: Winners and Losers from the Work-from-Home Technology Boon
33284.zh_title: 远程办公技术繁荣的赢家与输家
33284.authors: Morris A. Davis, Andra C. Ghent, Jesse M. Gregory
33284.abstract: We model how an increase in Work-from-Home (WFH) productivity differentially affects workers using a framework in which some workers cannot work offsite, some are hybrid, and some are completely remote. The improvement in WFH productivity increases housing demand and thus housing prices since housing is inelastically supplied. Because workers in non-telecommutable occupations must consume housing but their total factor productivity does not increase, the rise in house prices reduces their welfare. The welfare decline is equivalent to 1-9% of consumption, depending on how substitutable WFH is with onsite work, and it arises despite measured income of all workers increasing.
33284.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个框架模拟了远程办公生产率提高如何对不同工人产生差异化影响，在该框架中，一些工人无法远程工作，一些是混合工作模式，还有一些是完全远程工作。远程办公生产率的提高增加了住房需求，从而由于住房供给缺乏弹性而推高了房价。由于从事不可远程办公职业的工人必须消费住房，但其全要素生产率并未提高，房价上涨降低了他们的福利。福利下降相当于消费的1%至9%，具体取决于远程办公与现场工作的可替代程度，并且这种下降发生在所有工人的测量收入都增加的情况下。

33283.title: Firm Financing During Sudden Stops: Can Governments Substitute Markets?
33283.zh_title: 突然停止期间的企业融资：政府能否替代市场？
33283.authors: Miguel Acosta-Henao, Andrés Fernández, Patricia Gomez-Gonzalez, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
33283.abstract: Using comprehensive administrative data on Chilean firms, we examine whether credit lines and government-backed credit guarantees mitigated the impact of the large sudden stop event during the pandemic—the abrupt withdrawal of international capital. Our analysis employs a regression discontinuity design to demonstrate that firms eligible for these programs increased their borrowing from domestic lenders at a relatively lower cost. By reducing the cost of domestic currency debt relative to foreign currency debt, these policies effectively lowered the relative cost of domestic capital in the short term. This reduction in borrowing costs is conditional on selection effects at both the firm and bank levels, where only policy-eligible firms benefit from the lower credit costs from the same lender that non-eligible firms also borrow from. An open economy model with heterogeneous firms and financial frictions helps explain our findings: government interventions eased the higher cost of capital during the sudden stop by relaxing firms’ domestic collateral constraints, which in turn reduced domestic financial intermediaries’ risk aversion and boosted the supply of domestic credit in the face of shrinking international capital flows.
33283.zh_abstract: 利用智利企业的全面行政数据，我们考察了信贷额度和政府支持的信贷担保是否缓解了疫情期间大规模突然停止事件——国际资本突然撤出——的影响。我们的分析采用断点回归设计，证明符合这些计划条件的企业以相对较低的成本增加了从国内贷款机构的借款。通过降低本币债务相对于外币债务的成本，这些政策有效地在短期内降低了国内资本的相对成本。这种借贷成本的降低取决于企业和银行层面的选择效应，只有符合政策条件的企业才能从同一贷款机构（非符合条件的企业也从该机构借款）获得较低的信贷成本。一个包含异质性企业和金融摩擦的开放经济模型有助于解释我们的发现：政府干预通过放松企业的国内抵押品约束，缓解了突然停止期间较高的资本成本，这反过来降低了国内金融中介的风险厌恶，并在国际资本流动萎缩的情况下增加了国内信贷供给。

33282.title: Can Gifted Education Help Higher-Ability Boys from Disadvantaged Backgrounds?
33282.zh_title: 天才教育能否帮助来自弱势背景的高能力男孩？
33282.authors: David Card, Eric Chyn, Laura Giuliano
33282.abstract: Boys are less likely than girls to enter college, a gap often attributed to differences in noncognitive skills. We study how being classified as gifted – determined by having an IQ score of ≥116 – affects college entry for disadvantaged children in a large urban school district. We find increases of around 50 percent for marginally eligible boys, but only small effects for girls. There are also large effects for boys (but not girls) on course-taking and grades in middle and high school with no effects on standardized tests scores. These patterns suggest that gifted services raise the non-cognitive skills of underachieving boys, leading to gains in educational attainment.
33282.zh_abstract: 男孩进入大学的可能性低于女孩，这一差距通常归因于非认知技能的差异。我们研究了一个大城市学区中，被归类为天才——由智商分数≥116决定——如何影响弱势儿童的大学入学。我们发现，对于勉强合格的男孩，大学入学率增加了约50%，但对女孩只有微小的影响。对于男孩（而非女孩），天才服务还对初中和高中的课程选择和成绩产生了显著影响，但对标准化考试成绩没有影响。这些模式表明，天才服务提高了学业表现不佳男孩的非认知技能，从而带来了教育成就的提升。

33281.title: Dissertation Paths: Advisors and Students in the Economics Research Production Function
33281.zh_title: 论文路径：经济学研究生产函数中的导师与学生
33281.abstract: Elite economics PhD programs aim to train graduate students for a lifetime of academic research. This paper asks how advising affects graduate students’ post-PhD research productivity. Advising is highly concentrated: at the eight highly-selective schools in our study, a minority of advisors do most of the advising work. We quantify advisor attributes such as an advisor’s own research output and aspects of the advising relationship like coauthoring and research field affinity that might contribute to student research success. Students advised by research-active, prolific advisors tend to publish more, while coauthoring has no effect. Student-advisor research affinity also predicts student success. But a school-level aggregate production function provides much weaker evidence of causal effects, suggesting that successful advisors attract students likely to succeed–without necessarily boosting their students’ chances of success. Evidence for causal effects is strongest for a measure of advisors’ own research output. Aggregate student research output appears to scale linearly with graduate student enrollment, with no evidence of negative class-size effects. An analysis of gender differences in research output shows male and female graduate students to be equally productive in the first few years post-PhD, but female productivity peaks sooner than male productivity.
33281.zh_abstract: 精英经济学博士项目旨在培养研究生从事终身的学术研究。本文探讨了指导如何影响研究生获得博士学位后的研究生产力。指导高度集中：在我们研究的八所高选择性学校中，少数导师承担了大部分指导工作。我们量化了导师属性，例如导师自身的研究产出，以及指导关系的各个方面，如合著和研究领域亲和性，这些可能有助于学生的研究成功。由研究活跃、多产的导师指导的学生往往发表更多论文，而合著没有影响。学生与导师的研究亲和性也预测了学生的成功。但学校层面的总生产函数提供了更弱的因果效应证据，表明成功的导师吸引了可能成功的学生——而不一定提高学生成功的机会。因果效应的证据在导师自身研究产出的衡量指标上最强。学生的总研究产出似乎与研究生入学人数呈线性关系，没有证据表明班级规模有负面影响。对研究产出性别差异的分析显示，男性和女性研究生在获得博士学位后的最初几年生产力相当，但女性生产力的峰值比男性更早出现。
33281.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：A2, A20, A23, I21, I23

33280.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Africa
33280.zh_title: 非洲年轻人的心理健康
33280.abstract: Growing evidence from around the world suggests the mental health of children and young adults is declining. We examine trends in mental health in Africa where there has been little prior work. We examine data from a number of surveys including Afrobarometers, the Gallup World Poll, the World Values Surveys, UNICEF’s Multiple Cluster Indicator Surveys and Global Minds. We find little support for the proposition that the age structure of wellbeing in Africa has changed over the last decade, although the Global Minds surveys, conducted over the internet, do find mental health improves with age. One potential reason for this is the limited amount of internet access in Africa, especially for women. In countries like Burkina Faso and Guinea the majority of the population say they have never accessed the internet. In a new survey in rural Tanzania, where there is little or no internet access, mental health improves with age. The absence of the internet might help explain why the mental health of young Africans have been declining less than elsewhere other than for the internet savvy. However, there are dangers on the horizon as the sales of smartphones explode in Africa.
33280.zh_abstract: 来自世界各地的越来越多证据表明，儿童和年轻人的心理健康状况正在下降。我们考察了此前研究较少的非洲地区的心理健康趋势。我们分析了多项调查数据，包括非洲晴雨表、盖洛普世界民意调查、世界价值观调查、联合国儿童基金会多指标类集调查以及全球心智调查。我们发现，几乎没有证据支持非洲幸福感年龄结构在过去十年发生变化的观点，尽管通过互联网进行的全球心智调查确实发现心理健康随年龄增长而改善。一个潜在原因是非洲互联网接入有限，尤其是对女性而言。在布基纳法索和几内亚等国家，大多数人口表示他们从未使用过互联网。在一项针对坦桑尼亚农村地区（那里互联网接入很少或没有）的新调查中，心理健康随年龄增长而改善。互联网的缺失可能有助于解释为什么非洲年轻人的心理健康下降幅度小于其他地区，除了那些精通互联网的群体。然而，随着非洲智能手机销量的激增，危险正在逼近。

33279.title: The Benefits and Costs of Paid Family Leave
33279.zh_title: 带薪家庭假的好处与成本
33279.authors: Buyi Wang, Meredith Slopen, Irwin Garfinkel, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Robert Paul Hartley, Anastasia Koutavas, Christopher Wimer
33279.abstract: National paid family leave programs have been repeatedly proposed in the United States in recent years. To inform policy discussions, we provide a benefit-cost analysis of introducing such a program. We systematically identify high-quality, quasi-experimental studies on the impact of paid leave on infants and parents. Using the most conservative estimates or the mean estimates from this literature, we estimate that every $\$1,000$ investment in paid parental leave would generate, respectively, $\$7,275$ or $\$29,406$ in present discounted net social benefits. We use these estimates to conduct a microsimulation of benefits and costs of two policy proposals with different eligibility and wage replacement rates. The first, a 4-week program, would have an initial fiscal cost of under $\$2$ billion and net social benefits of $\$13$ (conservative) or $\$55$ billion (mean). The corresponding figures for the 12-week program are about 3.7 times larger, suggesting that either version would likely generate high returns.
33279.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国多次提出全国性的带薪家庭假计划。为给政策讨论提供信息，我们对引入此类计划进行了成本效益分析。我们系统地识别了关于带薪休假对婴儿和父母影响的高质量准实验研究。使用这些文献中最保守的估计或平均估计，我们估算出每1000美元的带薪育儿假投资将分别产生7275美元或29406美元的净社会效益现值。我们利用这些估算对两项具有不同资格条件和工资替代率的政策提案进行了效益和成本的微观模拟。第一个是4周计划，初始财政成本低于20亿美元，净社会效益为130亿美元（保守估计）或550亿美元（平均估计）。12周计划的相应数字大约是前者的3.7倍，表明任一版本都可能产生高回报。

33278.title: Non-Profit Hospital Governance, Conduct, and CEO Pay
33278.zh_title: 非营利医院治理、行为与CEO薪酬
33278.abstract: We investigate whether the membership of a non-profit hospital’s CEO on its board of directors is associated with CEO pay and several measures of hospital performance, including price, operating margin, quality, and service to low-income patients. Although the consequences of CEO board membership for for-profit firms have been studied extensively, the consequences for non-profits in general, and non-profit hospitals in particular, have received less attention. Because most hospitals are non-profit and non-profit hospital prices have increased rapidly over the past 20 years, this gap is important. We find a strong positive association between CEO board membership and non-profit hospital prices, operating margins, and CEO pay, with a weaker positive (negative) association between CEO board membership and quality (service to low-income patients). We conclude that non-profit hospitals’ CEO board membership is likely associated with increases in agency costs due to a lack of separation between management and control.
33278.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非营利医院CEO担任董事会成员是否与CEO薪酬以及多项医院绩效指标（包括价格、营业利润率、质量和对低收入患者的服务）相关。尽管CEO担任董事会成员对营利性公司的影响已被广泛研究，但其对非营利组织（尤其是非营利医院）的影响受到的关注较少。由于大多数医院是非营利性的，且非营利医院的价格在过去20年中迅速上涨，这一研究空白至关重要。我们发现，CEO担任董事会成员与非营利医院的价格、营业利润率和CEO薪酬之间存在强烈的正相关关系，而与质量（对低收入患者的服务）之间存在较弱的正（负）相关关系。我们得出结论，非营利医院CEO担任董事会成员很可能因管理层与控制权缺乏分离而导致代理成本增加。

33277.title: The Claiming of Children on U.S. Tax Returns
33277.zh_title: 美国纳税申报单上子女的申报情况
33277.authors: Geoffrey Gee, Jacob Goldin, Joseph Gray-Hancuch, Ithai Lurie, Vedant Vohra
33277.abstract: Tax benefits tied to children form a central component of the social safety net in the United States. To participate in these programs, taxpayers must claim a child on their tax return. We study the claiming of children on tax returns by drawing on health insurance information returns to establish the presence of children in the United States. We estimate that the vast majority of insured children (approximately 95 percent) and a significant majority (between 88 and 97 percent) of all U.S. children are claimed on tax returns. Unclaimed children are disproportionately concentrated in lower income households and are more likely to live in Black and Hispanic neighborhoods.
33277.zh_abstract: 与子女相关的税收优惠构成了美国社会安全网的核心组成部分。要参与这些计划，纳税人必须在其纳税申报单上申报子女。我们通过利用健康保险信息申报表来确定美国儿童的存在情况，从而研究纳税申报单上子女的申报情况。我们估计，绝大多数（约95%）有保险的儿童以及显著多数（介于88%至97%之间）的美国儿童在纳税申报单上被申报。未被申报的儿童不成比例地集中在低收入家庭，并且更可能生活在黑人和西班牙裔社区。
33277.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：H20, H24, H53, I13, I32

33276.title: The Relationship between Officer Misconduct and Conviction-less Arrests
33276.zh_title: 警察不当行为与无定罪逮捕之间的关系
33276.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Nayoung Rim, Roman Rivera
33276.abstract: Given the use of an individual’s arrest history for many economic and social outcomes, policymakers have enacted criminal justice reform measures. This paper examines which officers are making conviction‐less arrests (arrests that result in no charges or where the defendant is found not guilty), and whether these arrests can be reduced with increased oversight. Using the Chicago Police Department’s rotational duty calendar to obtain plausibly exogenous variation in the set of officers assigned to work on a particular day, we find that high‐misconduct officers are 12% more likely than no‐misconduct officers to make arrests that result in no charges and 31% more likely to make arrests with “not guilty” outcomes, with no difference in arrests yielding “guilty” outcomes. We also analyze two events that increased the transparency of police misconduct through public disclosure of complaint records and find that increased oversight reduces conviction‐less arrests, but with nuances across misconduct profiles–low‐misconduct officers show stronger responses and high‐misconduct officers show weaker responses.
33276.zh_abstract: 鉴于个人的逮捕记录被用于许多经济和社会结果，政策制定者已实施了刑事司法改革措施。本文研究了哪些警察在进行无定罪逮捕（即未导致指控或被告被判无罪的逮捕），以及这些逮捕是否可以通过加强监督来减少。利用芝加哥警察局的轮班日历，我们获得了特定日期执勤警察队伍的外生性变化，发现高不当行为警察比无不当行为警察进行无指控逮捕的可能性高12%，进行“无罪”结果逮捕的可能性高31%，而在导致“有罪”结果的逮捕方面没有差异。我们还分析了两个通过公开投诉记录增加警察不当行为透明度的事件，发现加强监督减少了无定罪逮捕，但在不同不当行为档案中存在细微差别——低不当行为警察表现出更强的反应，而高不当行为警察的反应较弱。
33276.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D73, J18, K42

33275.title: Transition Risk: Sources and Policy Responses
33275.zh_title: 转型风险：来源与政策应对
33275.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze, Inès Mourelon
33275.abstract: Transition risk – the financial stability risk related with decarbonization – is a major source of concern. The literature has so far only studied transition risk caused by carbon tax shocks. This paper explores other potential sources of transition risk: two other policy sources – subsidies to abatement or to green producers – and two preference-based sources – a shock to consumer preferences and a shock to investor preferences. We develop an environmental dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model that includes a frictional financial sector, and we consider macroprudential policy responses to transition risks. These different shocks have different effects on the possibility of transition risk and lead to different macroprudential policy implications.
33275.zh_abstract: 转型风险——与脱碳相关的金融稳定风险——是一个主要的担忧来源。迄今为止，文献仅研究了由碳税冲击引起的转型风险。本文探讨了转型风险的其他潜在来源：两种其他政策来源——对减排或绿色生产者的补贴——以及两种基于偏好的来源——消费者偏好冲击和投资者偏好冲击。我们开发了一个包含摩擦性金融部门的环境动态随机一般均衡模型，并考虑了针对转型风险的宏观审慎政策应对。这些不同的冲击对转型风险的可能性产生不同影响，并导致不同的宏观审慎政策含义。
33275.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E32, E60, G18, Q43, Q58

33274.title: Ideological Bias in Estimates of the Impact of Immigration
33274.zh_title: 移民影响估计中的意识形态偏见
33274.abstract: When studying policy-relevant topics, researchers’ policy preferences may shape the design, execution, analysis, and interpretation of results. Detection of such bias is challenging because the research process itself is not normally part of a controlled experimental setting. Our analysis exploits a rare opportunity where 158 researchers working independently in 71 research teams participated in an experiment. After being surveyed about their position on immigration policy, they used the same data to answer the same well-defined empirical question: Does immigration affect the level of public support for social welfare programs? The researchers estimated 1,253 alternative regression models, producing a frequency distribution of the measured impact ranging from strongly negative to strongly positive. We find that research teams composed of pro-immigration researchers estimated more positive impacts of immigration on public support for social programs, while anti-immigration research teams reported more negative estimates. Moreover, the methods used by teams with strong pro- or anti- immigration priors received lower “referee scores” from their peers in the experiment. These lower-rated models helped produce the different effects estimated by the teams at the tails of the immigration sentiment distribution. The underlying research design decisions are the mechanism through which ideology enters the production function for parameter estimates.
33274.zh_abstract: 在研究政策相关主题时，研究者的政策偏好可能会影响研究的设计、执行、分析和结果解读。检测此类偏见具有挑战性，因为研究过程本身通常不属于受控实验环境的一部分。我们的分析利用了一个罕见的机会，即158名研究人员在71个研究团队中独立参与了一项实验。在调查了他们关于移民政策的立场后，他们使用相同的数据来回答相同的明确实证问题：移民是否影响公众对社会福利计划的支持水平？研究人员估计了1253个替代回归模型，产生了从强烈负面到强烈正面的测量影响频率分布。我们发现，由支持移民的研究人员组成的研究团队估计出移民对公众支持社会计划的更正面影响，而反对移民的研究团队报告了更负面的估计。此外，在实验中，具有强烈支持或反对移民先验的团队使用的方法从其同行那里获得了较低的“评审分数”。这些评分较低的模型有助于产生移民情绪分布两端团队所估计的不同效应。潜在的研究设计决策是意识形态进入参数估计生产函数的机制。

33273.title: Deterrence Through Response Curves: An Empirical Analysis of the Gaza-Israel Conflict
33273.zh_title: 通过响应曲线进行威慑：加沙-以色列冲突的实证分析
33273.authors: Eli Berman, Prabin B. Khadka, Danny Klinenberg, Esteban Klor
33273.abstract: We use response curves in a repeated game to analyze key aspects of mutual deterrence: escalation, de-escalation, incomplete deterrence, and deterrence by denial. In this approach, episodes of violence are due to interacting response curves, which disincentivize opponents from attacking through both deterrence and compellence. Both sides punish attacks to maintain credibility in future episodes, disincentivizing larger attacks and yielding nonviolent lulls. We empirically estimate those curves using detailed incident data from the Israel-Gaza conflict between 2007 and 2017. Our estimates match the dynamics of the raw data: very frequent episodes of low lethality violent exchange. Response curves are stable and probably Markovian. They exhibit a posture consistent with incomplete deterrence: i.e., episodes de-escalate, but to a violent equilibrium. Israeli missile defense shifts the Gazan response curve to a less aggressive posture, as predicted by theory.
33273.zh_abstract: 我们在重复博弈中使用响应曲线来分析相互威慑的关键方面：升级、降级、不完全威慑和拒止威慑。在这种方法中，暴力事件源于相互作用的响应曲线，这些曲线通过威慑和强制手段阻止对手发动攻击。双方惩罚攻击以维持未来事件中的可信度，从而阻止更大规模的攻击并产生非暴力的平静期。我们利用2007年至2017年以色列-加沙冲突的详细事件数据，实证估计了这些曲线。我们的估计与原始数据的动态相符：非常频繁的低致死率暴力交换事件。响应曲线是稳定的，并且可能是马尔可夫性的。它们表现出与不完全威慑一致的状态：即事件降级，但达到一个暴力均衡。正如理论所预测的那样，以色列导弹防御系统将加沙的响应曲线转变为一种不那么激进的姿态。

33272.title: Lessons Learned and Ignored in U.S. Place-Based Policymaking
33272.zh_title: 美国地方政策制定中的经验教训与忽视
33272.abstract: Place-based programs aim to encourage economic and community development in defined geographic areas. They frequently offer tax incentives, grants, loans, or regulatory relief to private or non-profit entities for investing in specific communities. Funding can support a range of activities, including investments in job creation, infrastructure, workforce development, affordable housing, and more. Interest in spatially targeted interventions in the U.S. has waxed and waned over time in response to changing political environments, policy advocacy, and the evolving conclusions of academic research. The nature of place-based programs themselves has also evolved – often building on the lessons learned from past research and experience, but sometimes ignoring these lessons. In this chapter, we review what we have learned from past place-based job creation programs in the U.S. context. We also describe some of the newest developments in place-based policymaking and how recent programs’ successes and failures in heeding past lessons have contributed to their relative effectiveness.
33272.zh_abstract: 地方性项目旨在鼓励特定地理区域内的经济和社区发展。它们通常向投资于特定社区的私营或非营利实体提供税收优惠、赠款、贷款或监管减免。资金可支持一系列活动，包括对创造就业、基础设施、劳动力发展、经济适用房等方面的投资。在美国，对空间定向干预的兴趣随着政治环境、政策倡导以及学术研究结论的演变而时起时落。地方性项目本身的性质也在演变——通常建立在过去研究和经验教训的基础上，但有时也会忽视这些教训。在本章中，我们回顾了从美国过去的地方性创造就业项目中学到的经验。我们还描述了地方政策制定中的一些最新发展，以及近期项目在吸取过去教训方面的成功与失败如何影响了它们的相对有效性。

33271.title: Access to Digital Credit for Smallholder Farmers: Experimental Evidence from Ghana
33271.zh_title: 小农户获得数字信贷的途径：来自加纳的实验证据
33271.authors: Dean Karlan, Monica P. Lambon-Quayefio, Utsav Manjeer, Christopher R. Udry
33271.abstract: Digital finance in agriculture is a nascent technology which could help improve rural financial inclusion. In an experimental evaluation of a digital lending product for farmers in Southern Ghana, credit increases farm investments but has few statistically significant average effects on downstream outcomes. However, logistical challenges generated imperfect compliance with the treatment assignment, with some loans delivered in a timely fashion for agricultural investments and others coming later. We cautiously exploit this unplanned non-experimental implementation heterogeneity and conclude that agriculturally-focused digital credit platforms have potential to tackle persistent rural financial market imperfections, but the timing seems critical and deserves further study.
33271.zh_abstract: 农业领域的数字金融是一项新兴技术，可能有助于改善农村金融包容性。在对加纳南部农民数字贷款产品的实验评估中，信贷增加了农业投资，但对下游结果几乎没有统计上显著的平均效应。然而，后勤挑战导致了处理分配的不完全依从，部分贷款及时到位用于农业投资，而其他贷款则来得较晚。我们谨慎地利用这种非计划性的非实验性实施异质性，得出结论认为，以农业为重点的数字信贷平台有潜力解决持续的农村金融市场缺陷，但时机似乎至关重要，值得进一步研究。

33270.title: Optimal Income Tax Deductions for Mixed Business and Personal Expenditures
33270.zh_title: 混合经营与个人支出的最优所得税扣除
33270.authors: Jacob Goldin, Sebastian Koehne, Nicholas Lawson
33270.abstract: We study the optimal taxation of expenditures that generate income while also serving a consumption function. We characterize the Pareto optimal income tax deduction for such mixed-purpose expenditures within a generalized Atkinson-Stiglitz model. Pareto optimality requires a partial deduction for mixed-purpose expenditures, where the deduction rate depends on the fraction of an expenditure’s marginal benefits that are attributable to income-generation rather than consumption. We extend our results to account for several practical considerations, including potential constraints relating to a uniform deduction rate or a fixed income tax schedule. Our results provide a rationale for non-uniform commodity taxation, distinct from existing models of preference heterogeneity or non-separability.
33270.zh_abstract: 我们研究既能产生收入又具有消费功能的支出的最优税收。我们在广义的阿特金森-斯蒂格利茨模型中刻画了此类混合目的支出的帕累托最优所得税扣除。帕累托最优要求对混合目的支出进行部分扣除，扣除率取决于支出边际收益中归因于创收而非消费的比例。我们将结果扩展到考虑若干实际问题，包括与统一扣除率或固定所得税表相关的潜在约束。我们的结果为非统一商品税提供了理由，这不同于现有的偏好异质性或不可分性模型。

33269.title: College Major Restrictions and Student Stratification
33269.zh_title: 大学专业限制与学生分层
33269.abstract: Underrepresented minority (URM) college students have been steadily earning degrees in relatively less lucrative fields of study since the mid-1990s. A decomposition reveals that this widening gap is principally explained by rising stratification at public research universities, many of which increasingly prevent students with poor introductory grades from declaring popular majors. We investigate these major restriction policies by constructing a novel 50-year dataset covering four public research universities' student transcripts and employing a staggered difference-in-difference design around the implementation of 25 GPA-based restrictions. Restrictions disproportionately filter out less-prepared students with fewer pre-college academic opportunities, decreasing average URM enrollment shares by 20 percent. They do not measurably improve allocative efficiency across majors, departments' wage value-added, or filtered students' educational attainment. Using first-term course enrollments to identify students who intend to earn restricted majors, we find that major restrictions disproportionately lead URM students toward less lucrative majors, explaining nearly all growth in within-institution ethnic stratification since the 1990s.
33269.zh_abstract: 自20世纪90年代中期以来，代表性不足的少数族裔大学生在相对低薪的研究领域获得学位的比例稳步上升。一项分解显示，这种日益扩大的差距主要归因于公立研究型大学内部日益加剧的分层，其中许多大学越来越阻止入门成绩不佳的学生申报热门专业。我们通过构建一个涵盖四所公立研究型大学学生成绩单的50年新数据集，并采用围绕25项基于GPA的限制政策实施的交错双重差分设计，来研究这些专业限制政策。限制政策不成比例地筛选掉了那些大学前学术机会较少的准备不足的学生，使代表性不足的少数族裔平均入学份额下降了20%。它们并未显著提高跨专业的配置效率、部门的工资增值或被筛选学生的教育成就。通过利用第一学期的课程注册来识别有意攻读受限专业的学生，我们发现专业限制不成比例地引导代表性不足的少数族裔学生转向低薪专业，这几乎解释了自20世纪90年代以来校内种族分层增长的全部原因。
33269.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I24, J31, Z13

33268.title: Embedded Culture as a Source of Comparative Advantage
33268.zh_title: 嵌入性文化作为比较优势的来源
33268.authors: Luigi Guiso, Paola Sapienza, Luigi Zingales
33268.abstract: This paper examines how the concept of embedded culture played a transformative role in the ongoing cultural revolution within economics and business. We trace the field's shift from the 20th-century concept of homo economicus universalis to an approach incorporating cultural embeddedness in economic behavior. Beyond documenting this intellectual transformation, we identify fertile areas for future research and explore how an embedded cultural perspective can enhance both our understanding of economic phenomena and the design of effective policies.
33268.zh_abstract: 本文考察了嵌入性文化的概念如何在经济学和商业领域持续的文化革命中发挥变革性作用。我们追溯了该领域从20世纪的普遍经济人概念向将文化嵌入性纳入经济行为的方法的转变。除了记录这一知识转型，我们还确定了未来研究的肥沃领域，并探讨了嵌入性文化视角如何能够增强我们对经济现象的理解以及有效政策的设计。

33267.title: Collective Bargaining, Unions, and the Wage Structure: An International Perspective
33267.zh_title: 集体谈判、工会与工资结构：国际视角
33267.authors: Simon Jäger, Suresh Naidu, Benjamin Schoefer
33267.abstract: In this paper, we assess the recent economics literature on collective bargaining. Despite a declining trend in the OECD in coverage and especially union membership, a large share of formal workers around the world are still covered by collective bargaining agreements. We describe the substantial institutional variation across a variety of countries, highlighting research done with modern research designs and recently available administrative datasets. We then estimate a canonical empirical model of individual-level coverage effects and selection in harmonized cross-country data across 18 advanced economies (in Europe and North America). We estimate collective bargaining coverage premia, compression, selection, and spillover coefficients in each country, and use these to document considerable heterogeneity in collective bargaining coverage effects on the wage structure. While there is a strong negative relationship between collective bargaining coverage and wage inequality across countries, substantial uncertainties remain about the underlying mechanisms. Coverage effects may operate through direct premia, selection, or spillovers onto non-covered wages, but distinguishing and quantifying these channels and how they vary across institutional contexts remains a key challenge for future research. In our data, we find that the direct effect of coverage on wages of covered workers does not explain much of the cross-country correlation between coverage and inequality. While compelling research designs often result from specific institutional variation, we also emphasize that these contextual details must be accounted for when comparing estimates across industrial relations systems. A particularly pressing need is for more compelling causal evidence on spillover effects, which could help reconcile conflicting micro and macro evidence on how collective bargaining shapes the wage distribution.
33267.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们评估了近期关于集体谈判的经济学文献。尽管经合组织国家的覆盖率和尤其是工会会员人数呈下降趋势，但全球仍有大量正规工人受到集体谈判协议的覆盖。我们描述了各国之间显著的制度差异，重点介绍了采用现代研究设计和近期可获得的行政数据集进行的研究。然后，我们在18个发达经济体（欧洲和北美）的协调跨国数据中，估计了一个关于个体层面覆盖效应和选择的经典实证模型。我们估算了每个国家的集体谈判覆盖溢价、压缩、选择和溢出系数，并利用这些系数记录了集体谈判覆盖效应对工资结构的显著异质性。尽管集体谈判覆盖与跨国工资不平等之间存在强烈的负相关关系，但关于其潜在机制仍存在相当大的不确定性。覆盖效应可能通过直接溢价、选择或对未覆盖工资的溢出效应发挥作用，但区分和量化这些渠道以及它们如何随制度背景变化，仍是未来研究的关键挑战。在我们的数据中，我们发现覆盖对受覆盖工人工资的直接效应并不能解释覆盖与不平等之间跨国相关性的很大一部分。虽然令人信服的研究设计通常源于特定的制度变化，但我们也强调，在比较不同产业关系体系的估计值时，必须考虑这些背景细节。一个尤为迫切的需求是，需要更有说服力的关于溢出效应的因果证据，这有助于调和关于集体谈判如何塑造工资分布的微观与宏观证据之间的矛盾。
33267.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E0, F0, J0, M0, O0

33266.title: Gender Inequality in the Labor Market: Continuing Progress?
33266.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的性别不平等：持续进步？
33266.abstract: This article examines the trends in women’s economic outcomes in the United States focusing primarily on labor force participation, occupational attainment, and the gender wage gap. The author first highlights considerable progress on all dimensions prior to the 1990s followed by a slowing or stalling of gains thereafter, with a plateauing of female labor force participation trends and a slowing of women’s occupational and wage convergence with men. She considers the likelihood of a resumption of progress in narrowing gender gaps in these areas, concluding it is unlikely without policy intervention. She then considers some new policy initiatives addressing work-family issues and labor market discrimination that may hold potential for increasing female labor force participation and narrowing gender inequities in the labor market.
33266.zh_abstract: 本文考察了美国女性经济成果的趋势，主要关注劳动力参与、职业成就和性别工资差距。作者首先强调了在20世纪90年代之前所有方面的显著进步，随后是进步放缓或停滞，表现为女性劳动力参与率趋势趋于平稳，以及女性在职业和工资方面与男性趋同的速度放缓。她考虑了在这些领域缩小性别差距方面恢复进展的可能性，并得出结论认为，没有政策干预，这种可能性不大。然后，她考虑了一些解决工作-家庭问题和劳动力市场歧视的新政策举措，这些举措可能具有提高女性劳动力参与率和缩小劳动力市场性别不平等的潜力。
33266.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J16, J18, J21, J24, J31, J48, J71

33265.title: Handling Endogenous Marketing Mix Regressors in Correlated Heterogeneous Panels with Copula Augmented Mean Group Estimation
33265.zh_title: 在相关异质性面板中处理内生性营销组合回归量：基于Copula增强均值组估计
33265.authors: Liying Yang, Yi Qian, Hui Xie
33265.abstract: Endogeneity is a primary concern when evaluating causal effects using observational panel data. While unit-specific intercepts control for unobserved time-invariant confounders, dependence between (i) regressors (e.g., marketing mix strategy of interests) and the current error term (regressor endogeneity) and/or between (ii) regressors and heterogeneous slopes (slope endogeneity) can introduce significant endogeneity bias. This paper proposes a two-stage copula endogeneity correction mean group (2sCOPE-MG) estimator for panel models, simultaneously addressing both endogeneity concerns. We generalize the IV-free copula control function, employing a general location Gaussian copula that effectively captures the panel structure. The heterogeneous coefficients are treated as unit-specific parameters without distributional assumptions. Consequently, 2sCOPE-MG allows for arbitrary dependence structure between heterogeneous coefficients and regressors. Compared with Haschka (2022), 2sCOPE-MG is more general (permitting correlated random coefficients), more robust (allowing for heterogeneity in the variance-covariance matrix of the Gaussian copula), and easier to implement. We extend 2sCOPE-MG to dynamic panels, where intertemporal dependence in the outcome process can be suitably captured. We derive its asymptotic properties and an analytical variance formula for inference without bootstrapping. We demonstrate its usage by simulations and a marketing mix response application across 21 categories accounting for both endogeneities in store-sales panel data.
33265.zh_abstract: 在使用观测面板数据评估因果效应时，内生性是一个主要问题。虽然个体特定截距项控制了未观测到的时不变混杂因素，但回归量（例如，感兴趣的营销组合策略）与当前误差项之间的依赖关系（回归量内生性）和/或回归量与异质性斜率之间的依赖关系（斜率内生性）可能会引入显著的内生性偏差。本文针对面板模型提出了一种两阶段Copula内生性校正均值组估计量，同时解决了这两种内生性问题。我们推广了无工具变量的Copula控制函数，采用了一种能有效捕捉面板结构的一般位置高斯Copula。异质性系数被视为个体特定参数，无需分布假设。因此，2sCOPE-MG允许异质性系数与回归量之间存在任意依赖结构。与Haschka（2022）相比，2sCOPE-MG更通用（允许相关的随机系数）、更稳健（允许高斯Copula方差-协方差矩阵的异质性），且更易于实施。我们将2sCOPE-MG扩展到动态面板，其中结果过程中的跨期依赖可以被适当捕捉。我们推导了其渐近性质以及无需自举法即可进行推断的解析方差公式。我们通过模拟和一项涵盖21个类别的营销组合响应应用（考虑了商店销售面板数据中的两种内生性）来展示其用法。

33264.title: Adaptation to Climate Change
33264.authors: Tamma Carleton, Esther Duflo, Kelsey Jack, Guglielmo Zappalà
33264.abstract: Mounting costs of anthropogenic climate change reveal that adaptation will be essential to human well-being in coming decades. At the same time, the literature on the economics of adaptation offers relatively little guidance for emerging policy. In this chapter, we review the existing literature, focusing on how it can better inform adaptation policy design and implementation. A simple conceptual model of adaptation decision-making describes two core adaptation channels that we link to two streams of adaptation literature, which have emerged largely in parallel. We outline how insights from these literatures can be used for adaptation policy evaluation, highlight key limitations of and opportunities for public intervention in private adaptation markets, and provide guidance for future work.
33264.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化日益增加的成本表明，适应对于未来几十年的人类福祉至关重要。与此同时，关于适应经济学的文献为新兴政策提供的指导相对较少。在本章中，我们回顾现有文献，重点关注如何更好地为适应政策的设计和实施提供信息。一个简单的适应决策概念模型描述了两种核心适应渠道，我们将它们与两条大致平行发展的适应文献流联系起来。我们概述了如何利用这些文献的见解进行适应政策评估，强调了公共干预在私人适应市场中的关键局限性和机遇，并为未来工作提供指导。

33294.title: Does Q&A Boost Engagement? Health Messaging Experiments in the U.S. and Ghana
33294.zh_title: 问答形式能提升参与度吗？美国和加纳的健康信息实验
33294.authors: Erika Kirgios, Susan Athey, Angela L. Duckworth, Dean Karlan, Michael Luca, Katherine L. Milkman, Molly Offer-Westort
33294.abstract: Effective information sharing is critical for the success of organizations and governments. Because information that is easy to access is more likely to be adopted, leaders often minimize friction in information delivery. However, one type of friction may increase engagement: piquing curiosity by posing relevant questions prior to sharing information. To test this, we shared identical information about COVID-19 in either question-and-answer format or via direct statements across two preregistered field experiments in Ghana and Michigan (total N=49,395). Q&A-style communication increased information seeking about directly related topics (e.g., how to wear a mask properly) by 1.0 percentage-point (216%) in Ghana and by 1.1 percentage-points (19%) in Michigan (p’s<0.001), and increased self-reported behavior change by 1.3 percentage-points (4%) in Michigan (p=0.002). However, sharing information in Q&A format did not increase interest in general COVID-19 information in either setting, suggesting that the impact of Q&A-style messaging on information seeking may be issue-specific. In Michigan, both Q&A-style and direct statement messaging produced less information-seeking than sending no informational messages, likely due to differential attrition: the more texts participants received, the more likely they were to opt out of receiving messages, which made it impossible for them to seek more information via text. In a follow-up implementation experiment with social media ads (a messaging strategy without attrition challenges) Q&A-style ads generated 9-11% more unique clicks to the CDC website per dollar spent than ads that directly stated information about vaccines (p<0.001). We speculate that Q&A-style information delivery may stimulate curiosity, driving its benefits.
33294.zh_abstract: 有效的信息共享对于组织和政府的成功至关重要。由于易于获取的信息更有可能被采纳，领导者通常会尽量减少信息传递中的摩擦。然而，一种类型的摩擦可能会增加参与度：在分享信息之前通过提出相关问题来激发好奇心。为了验证这一点，我们在加纳和密歇根州进行了两项预先注册的现场实验（总样本量N=49,395），以问答形式或直接陈述形式分享了关于COVID-19的相同信息。问答式沟通使加纳关于直接相关主题（例如，如何正确佩戴口罩）的信息寻求增加了1.0个百分点（216%），在密歇根州增加了1.1个百分点（19%）（p值均<0.001），并使密歇根州自我报告的行为改变增加了1.3个百分点（4%）（p=0.002）。然而，以问答形式分享信息并未增加两个环境中对一般COVID-19信息的兴趣，这表明问答式信息传递对信息寻求的影响可能是特定于议题的。在密歇根州，问答式和直接陈述式信息传递产生的信息寻求都少于不发送任何信息，这可能是由于差异性的流失：参与者收到的短信越多，他们就越有可能选择退出接收信息，这使得他们无法通过短信寻求更多信息。在后续的社交媒体广告实施实验（一种没有流失挑战的信息传递策略）中，问答式广告每花费一美元产生的CDC网站独立点击量比直接陈述疫苗信息的广告多9-11%（p<0.001）。我们推测，问答式信息传递可能激发好奇心，从而带来其益处。
